(* ******************************************************************************* *)
(** * Strict bicategories
 ********************************************************************************* *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.TwoCategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.All.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfUnivCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.TransportLaws.

Local Open Scope bicategory_scope.
Local Open Scope cat.

(** Data of strictness structure *)
Definition strictness_structure_data
           (B : bicat)
  : UU
  := (∏ (a b : B) (f : a --> b), id₁ a · f = f)
     × (∏ (a b : B) (f : a --> b), f · id₁ b = f)
     × (∏ (a b c d : B) (f : a --> b) (g : b --> c) (h : c --> d),
        f · (g · h) = f · g · h).

(** Projections *)
Definition plunitor
           {B : bicat}
           (S : strictness_structure_data B)
           {a b : B}
           (f : a --> b)
  : id₁ a · f = f
  := pr1 S _ _ f.

Definition plinvunitor
           {B : bicat}
           (S : strictness_structure_data B)
           {a b : B}
           (f : a --> b)
  : f = id₁ a · f
  := !(pr1 S _ _ f).

Definition prunitor
           {B : bicat}
           (S : strictness_structure_data B)
           {a b : B}
           (f : a --> b)
  : f · id₁ b = f
  := pr12 S _ _ f.

Definition prinvunitor
           {B : bicat}
           (S : strictness_structure_data B)
           {a b : B}
           (f : a --> b)
  : f = f · id₁ b
  := !(pr12 S _ _ f).

Definition plassociator
           {B : bicat}
           (S : strictness_structure_data B)
           {a b c d : B}
           (f : a --> b)
           (g : b --> c)
           (h : c --> d)
  : f · (g · h) = f · g · h
  := pr22 S _ _ _ _ f g h.

Definition prassociator
           {B : bicat}
           (S : strictness_structure_data B)
           {a b c d : B}
           (f : a --> b)
           (g : b --> c)
           (h : c --> d)
  : f · g · h = f · (g · h)
  := !(pr22 S _ _ _ _ f g h).

(** The requirements for the data *)
Definition strictness_structure_laws
           {B : bicat}
           (S : strictness_structure_data B)
  : UU
  := (∏ (a b : B) (f : a --> b), pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 _ _ (plunitor S f)) = lunitor f)
     × (∏ (a b : B) (f : a --> b), pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 _ _ (prunitor S f)) = runitor f)
     × (∏ (a b c d : B) (f : a --> b) (g : b --> c) (h : c --> d),
        pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 _ _ (plassociator S f g h)) = lassociator f g h).

Definition strictness_structure
           (B : bicat)
  : UU
  := ∑ (S : strictness_structure_data B), strictness_structure_laws S.

(** The laws form a proposition *)

B: bicat
isPredicate strictness_structure_laws


B: bicat
isPredicate strictness_structure_laws

  
B: bicat
S: strictness_structure_data B
isaprop (strictness_structure_laws S)

  
B: bicat
S: strictness_structure_data B
isaprop
  (∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
   pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ a · f) f (plunitor S f)) =
   lunitor f)
B: bicat
S: strictness_structure_data B
isaprop
  (∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
   pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 (f · id₁ b) f (prunitor S f)) =
   runitor f)
B: bicat
S: strictness_structure_data B
isaprop
  (∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧),
   pr1
     (idtoiso_2_1 (f · (g · h)) (f · g · h)
        (plassociator S f g h)) = lassociator f g h)

  
B: bicat
S: strictness_structure_data B
isaprop
  (∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
   pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ a · f) f (plunitor S f)) =
   lunitor f)
 
B: bicat
S: strictness_structure_data B
t, t0: B
t1: B ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t1 : B ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
    pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ t · t1) t1 (plunitor S t1)) =
    lunitor t1) t1)

    apply B.
  
B: bicat
S: strictness_structure_data B
isaprop
  (∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
   pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 (f · id₁ b) f (prunitor S f)) =
   runitor f)
 
B: bicat
S: strictness_structure_data B
t, t0: B
t1: B ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t1 : B ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
    pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 (t1 · id₁ t0) t1 (prunitor S t1)) =
    runitor t1) t1)

    apply B.
  
B: bicat
S: strictness_structure_data B
isaprop
  (∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧),
   pr1
     (idtoiso_2_1 (f · (g · h)) (f · g · h)
        (plassociator S f g h)) = lassociator f g h)
 
B: bicat
S: strictness_structure_data B
t, t0, t1, t2: B
t3: B ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t4: B ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
t5: B ⟦ t1, t2 ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t5 : B ⟦ t1, t2 ⟧,
    pr1
      (idtoiso_2_1 (t3 · (t4 · t5)) (t3 · t4 · t5)
         (plassociator S t3 t4 t5)) =
    lassociator t3 t4 t5) t5)

    apply B.
Qed.

(** Projections *)
Coercion strictness_structure_to_data
         {B : bicat}
         (S : strictness_structure B)
  : strictness_structure_data B
  := pr1 S.

Definition idtoiso_plunitor
           {B : bicat}
           (S : strictness_structure B)
           {a b : B}
           (f : a --> b)
  : pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 _ _ (plunitor S f)) = lunitor f
  := pr12 S _ _ f.

Definition idtoiso_prunitor
           {B : bicat}
           (S : strictness_structure B)
           {a b : B}
           (f : a --> b)
  : pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 _ _ (prunitor S f)) = runitor f
  := pr122 S _ _ f.

Definition idtoiso_plassociator
           {B : bicat}
           (S : strictness_structure B)
           {a b c d : B}
           (f : a --> b)
           (g : b --> c)
           (h : c --> d)
  : pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 _ _ (plassociator S f g h)) = lassociator f g h
  := pr222 S _ _ _ _ f g h.

(** Coherent strictness structure. For these, one also needs the triangle and pentagon. *)
Definition is_coh_strictness_structure
           {B : bicat}
           (S : strictness_structure B)
  : UU
  := (∏ (a b c : B) (f : a --> b) (g : b --> c),
      maponpaths (λ z, f · z) (plunitor S g)
      =
      plassociator S _ _ _ @ maponpaths (λ z, z · g) (prunitor S f))
      ×
      ∏ (v w x y z : B)
      (f : v --> w) (g : w --> x)
      (h : x --> y) (k : y --> z),
     maponpaths (λ z, f · z) (plassociator S g h k)
     @ plassociator S f (g · h) k
     @ maponpaths (λ z, z · k) (plassociator S f g h)
     =
     plassociator S f g (h · k)
     @ plassociator S (f · g) h k.

Definition coh_strictness_structure
           (B : bicat)
  := ∑ (S : strictness_structure B), is_coh_strictness_structure S.

Coercion pr_strictness_structure
         {B : bicat}
         (S : coh_strictness_structure B)
  : strictness_structure B
  := pr1 S.

(** Being coherent is a proposition *)

B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isPredicate is_coh_strictness_structure


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isPredicate is_coh_strictness_structure

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
S: strictness_structure B
isaprop (is_coh_strictness_structure S)

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
S: strictness_structure B
isaprop
  (∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧),
   maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ b, c ⟧, f · z) (plunitor S g) =
   plassociator S f (id₁ b) g @
   maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ a, b ⟧, z · g) (prunitor S f))
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
S: strictness_structure B
isaprop
  (∏ (v w x y z : B) (f : B ⟦ v, w ⟧) (g : B ⟦ w, x ⟧)
   (h : B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (k : B ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   maponpaths (λ z0 : B ⟦ w, z ⟧, f · z0)
     (plassociator S g h k) @
   plassociator S f (g · h) k @
   maponpaths (λ z0 : B ⟦ v, y ⟧, z0 · k)
     (plassociator S f g h) =
   plassociator S f g (h · k) @
   plassociator S (f · g) h k)

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
S: strictness_structure B
isaprop
  (∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧),
   maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ b, c ⟧, f · z) (plunitor S g) =
   plassociator S f (id₁ b) g @
   maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ a, b ⟧, z · g) (prunitor S f))
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
S: strictness_structure B
t, t0, t1: B
t2: B ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t3: B ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t3 : B ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧,
    maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧, t2 · z)
      (plunitor S t3) =
    plassociator S t2 (id₁ t0) t3 @
    maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ t, t0 ⟧, z · t3)
      (prunitor S t2)) t3)

    exact (univalent_bicategory_1_cell_hlevel_3 _ HB _ _ _ _ _ _).
  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
S: strictness_structure B
isaprop
  (∏ (v w x y z : B) (f : B ⟦ v, w ⟧) (g : B ⟦ w, x ⟧)
   (h : B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (k : B ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   maponpaths (λ z0 : B ⟦ w, z ⟧, f · z0)
     (plassociator S g h k) @
   plassociator S f (g · h) k @
   maponpaths (λ z0 : B ⟦ v, y ⟧, z0 · k)
     (plassociator S f g h) =
   plassociator S f g (h · k) @
   plassociator S (f · g) h k)
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
S: strictness_structure B
t, t0, t1, t2, t3: B
t4: B ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t5: B ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
t6: B ⟦ t1, t2 ⟧
t7: B ⟦ t2, t3 ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t7 : B ⟦ t2, t3 ⟧,
    maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ t0, t3 ⟧, t4 · z)
      (plassociator S t5 t6 t7) @
    plassociator S t4 (t5 · t6) t7 @
    maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ t, t2 ⟧, z · t7)
      (plassociator S t4 t5 t6) =
    plassociator S t4 t5 (t6 · t7) @
    plassociator S (t4 · t5) t6 t7) t7)

    exact (univalent_bicategory_1_cell_hlevel_3 _ HB _ _ _ _ _ _).
Qed.

(** Definition of 2-category *)
Definition locally_strict
           (B : bicat)
  : UU
  := ∏ (a b : B), isaset (a --> b).

Definition globally_strict
           (B : bicat)
  : UU
  := isaset B.

(** Set bicategories *)
Definition bisetcat
  : UU
  := ∑ (B : bicat), locally_strict B × globally_strict B.

Coercion bisetcat_to_bicat
         (B : bisetcat)
  : bicat
  := pr1 B.


B: bisetcat
locally_strict B


B: bisetcat
locally_strict B

  exact (pr12 B).
Qed.


B: bisetcat
globally_strict B


B: bisetcat
globally_strict B

  exact (pr22 B).
Qed.

Definition is_strict_bicat
           (B : bicat)
  : UU
  := locally_strict B
     ×
     coh_strictness_structure B.


B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
is_strict_bicat B


B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
is_strict_bicat B

  
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
locally_strict B
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
(λ _ : locally_strict B, coh_strictness_structure B)
  ?pr1

  
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
locally_strict B
 exact HB.
  
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
(λ _ : locally_strict B, coh_strictness_structure B)
  HB
 
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), id₁ a · f = f
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · id₁ b = f
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
(λ _ : ∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · id₁ b = f,
 ∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧), f · (g · h) = f · g · h) ?pr10
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ a · f) f
     (plunitor (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) f)) = lunitor f
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 (f · id₁ b) f
     (prunitor (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) f)) = runitor f
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
(λ _ : ∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
       pr1
         (idtoiso_2_1 (f · id₁ b) f
            (prunitor (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) f)) =
       runitor f,
 ∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧),
 pr1
   (idtoiso_2_1 (f · (g · h)) (f · g · h)
      (plassociator (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) f g h)) =
 lassociator f g h) ?pr12
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧),
maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ b, c ⟧, f · z)
  (plunitor
     ((?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2),, ?pr11,, ?pr12,, ?pr20) g) =
plassociator
  ((?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2),, ?pr11,, ?pr12,, ?pr20) f
  (id₁ b) g @
maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ a, b ⟧, z · g)
  (prunitor
     ((?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2),, ?pr11,, ?pr12,, ?pr20) f)
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
(λ _ : ∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧),
       maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ b, c ⟧, f · z)
         (plunitor
            ((?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2),,
             ?pr11,, ?pr12,, ?pr20) g) =
       plassociator
         ((?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2),,
          ?pr11,, ?pr12,, ?pr20) f (id₁ b) g @
       maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ a, b ⟧, z · g)
         (prunitor
            ((?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2),,
             ?pr11,, ?pr12,, ?pr20) f),
 ∏ (v w x y z : B) (f : B ⟦ v, w ⟧) (g : B ⟦ w, x ⟧)
 (h : B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (k : B ⟦ y, z ⟧),
 maponpaths (λ z0 : B ⟦ w, z ⟧, f · z0)
   (plassociator
      ((?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2),, ?pr11,, ?pr12,, ?pr20)
      g h k) @
 plassociator
   ((?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2),, ?pr11,, ?pr12,, ?pr20) f
   (g · h) k @
 maponpaths (λ z0 : B ⟦ v, y ⟧, z0 · k)
   (plassociator
      ((?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2),, ?pr11,, ?pr12,, ?pr20)
      f g h) =
 plassociator
   ((?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2),, ?pr11,, ?pr12,, ?pr20) f g
   (h · k) @
 plassociator
   ((?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2),, ?pr11,, ?pr12,, ?pr20)
   (f · g) h k) ?pr13

    
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), id₁ a · f = f
 exact (@plunitor _ S).
    
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · id₁ b = f
 exact (@prunitor _ S).
    
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
(λ _ : ∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · id₁ b = f,
 ∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧), f · (g · h) = f · g · h)
  (@prunitor B S)
 exact (@plassociator _ S).
    
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ a · f) f
     (plunitor
        (@plunitor B S,,
         @prunitor B S,, @plassociator B S) f)) =
lunitor f
 exact (@idtoiso_plunitor _ S).
    
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 (f · id₁ b) f
     (prunitor
        (@plunitor B S,,
         @prunitor B S,, @plassociator B S) f)) =
runitor f
 exact (@idtoiso_prunitor _ S).
    
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
(λ _ : ∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
       pr1
         (idtoiso_2_1 (f · id₁ b) f
            (prunitor
               (@plunitor B S,,
                @prunitor B S,, @plassociator B S) f)) =
       runitor f,
 ∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧),
 pr1
   (idtoiso_2_1 (f · (g · h)) (f · g · h)
      (plassociator
         (@plunitor B S,,
          @prunitor B S,, @plassociator B S) f g h)) =
 lassociator f g h) (@idtoiso_prunitor B S)
 exact (@idtoiso_plassociator _ S).
    
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧),
maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ b, c ⟧, f · z)
  (plunitor
     ((@plunitor B S,,
       @prunitor B S,, @plassociator B S),,
      @idtoiso_plunitor B S,,
      @idtoiso_prunitor B S,,
      @idtoiso_plassociator B S) g) =
plassociator
  ((@plunitor B S,, @prunitor B S,, @plassociator B S),,
   @idtoiso_plunitor B S,,
   @idtoiso_prunitor B S,, @idtoiso_plassociator B S)
  f (id₁ b) g @
maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ a, b ⟧, z · g)
  (prunitor
     ((@plunitor B S,,
       @prunitor B S,, @plassociator B S),,
      @idtoiso_plunitor B S,,
      @idtoiso_prunitor B S,,
      @idtoiso_plassociator B S) f)
 abstract (simpl ; intros ; apply HB).
    
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
S: strictness_structure B
(λ _ : ∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧),
       maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ b, c ⟧, f · z)
         (plunitor
            ((@plunitor B S,,
              @prunitor B S,, @plassociator B S),,
             @idtoiso_plunitor B S,,
             @idtoiso_prunitor B S,,
             @idtoiso_plassociator B S) g) =
       plassociator
         ((@plunitor B S,,
           @prunitor B S,, @plassociator B S),,
          @idtoiso_plunitor B S,,
          @idtoiso_prunitor B S,,
          @idtoiso_plassociator B S) f (id₁ b) g @
       maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ a, b ⟧, z · g)
         (prunitor
            ((@plunitor B S,,
              @prunitor B S,, @plassociator B S),,
             @idtoiso_plunitor B S,,
             @idtoiso_prunitor B S,,
             @idtoiso_plassociator B S) f),
 ∏ (v w x y z : B) (f : B ⟦ v, w ⟧) (g : B ⟦ w, x ⟧)
 (h : B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (k : B ⟦ y, z ⟧),
 maponpaths (λ z0 : B ⟦ w, z ⟧, f · z0)
   (plassociator
      ((@plunitor B S,,
        @prunitor B S,, @plassociator B S),,
       @idtoiso_plunitor B S,,
       @idtoiso_prunitor B S,,
       @idtoiso_plassociator B S) g h k) @
 plassociator
   ((@plunitor B S,, @prunitor B S,, @plassociator B S),,
    @idtoiso_plunitor B S,,
    @idtoiso_prunitor B S,, @idtoiso_plassociator B S)
   f (g · h) k @
 maponpaths (λ z0 : B ⟦ v, y ⟧, z0 · k)
   (plassociator
      ((@plunitor B S,,
        @prunitor B S,, @plassociator B S),,
       @idtoiso_plunitor B S,,
       @idtoiso_prunitor B S,,
       @idtoiso_plassociator B S) f g h) =
 plassociator
   ((@plunitor B S,, @prunitor B S,, @plassociator B S),,
    @idtoiso_plunitor B S,,
    @idtoiso_prunitor B S,, @idtoiso_plassociator B S)
   f g (h · k) @
 plassociator
   ((@plunitor B S,, @prunitor B S,, @plassociator B S),,
    @idtoiso_plunitor B S,,
    @idtoiso_prunitor B S,, @idtoiso_plassociator B S)
   (f · g) h k) (make_is_strict_bicat_subproof B HB S)
 abstract (simpl ; intros ; apply HB).
Defined.


B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
isPredicate is_coh_strictness_structure

isPredicate is_coh_strictness_structure

c₁ = c₂

pr2 c₁ = pr2 c₂

c₁, c₂: is_coh_strictness_structure z
pr1 c₁ = pr1 c₂
 
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
z: strictness_structure B
c₁, c₂: is_coh_strictness_structure z
x, x0, x1: B
x2: B ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x3: B ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
pr1 c₁ x x0 x1 x2 x3 = pr1 c₂ x x0 x1 x2 x3

    apply (isasetaprop (HB _ _ _ _)).
  
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
z: strictness_structure B
c₁, c₂: is_coh_strictness_structure z
pr2 c₁ = pr2 c₂
 
B: bicat
HB: locally_strict B
z: strictness_structure B
c₁, c₂: is_coh_strictness_structure z
x, x0, x1, x2, x3: B
x4: B ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x5: B ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x6: B ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
x7: B ⟦ x2, x3 ⟧
pr2 c₁ x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4 x5 x6 x7 =
pr2 c₂ x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4 x5 x6 x7

    apply (isasetaprop (HB _ _ _ _)).
Qed.

B: bicat

pr221 (pr1 CSx) = pr221 (pr1 CSy)

LSY: locally_strict B
CSy: coh_strictness_structure B
x, x0: B
x1: B ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
(pr111 CSx) x x0 x1 = (pr111 CSy) x x0 x1

      apply LSx.
    
B: bicat
LSx: locally_strict B
CSx: coh_strictness_structure B

B: bicat
LSx: locally_strict B

pr221 (pr1 CSx) = pr221 (pr1 CSy)
 
B: bicat
LSx: locally_strict B
CSx: coh_strictness_structure B
LSY: locally_strict B
CSy: coh_strictness_structure B
x, x0, x1, x2: B
x3: B ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: B ⟦ x0, x1 ⟧
x5: B ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
(pr221 (pr1 CSx)) x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4 x5 =
(pr221 (pr1 CSy)) x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4 x5

      apply LSx.
Qed.

Definition strict_bicat
  := ∑ (B : bicat), is_strict_bicat B.

Coercion bicat_of_strict_bicat
         (B : strict_bicat)
  : bicat
  := pr1 B.

(** Strict bicat to 2-cat *)

B: strict_bicat
precategory_data


B: strict_bicat
precategory_data

  
B: strict_bicat
precategory_data
 
B: strict_bicat
precategory_ob_mor
B: strict_bicat
∏ c : ?C, ?C ⟦ c, c ⟧
B: strict_bicat
∏ a b c : ?C, ?C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → ?C ⟦ b, c ⟧ → ?C ⟦ a, c ⟧

    
B: strict_bicat
precategory_ob_mor
 
B: strict_bicat
UU
B: strict_bicat
?ob → ?ob → UU

      
B: strict_bicat
UU
 exact (ob B).
      
B: strict_bicat
B → B → UU
 exact (λ b₁ b₂, b₁ --> b₂).
    
B: strict_bicat
∏
c : make_precategory_ob_mor B
      (λ b₁ b₂ : B, B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧),
make_precategory_ob_mor B (λ b₁ b₂ : B, B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧)
⟦ c, c ⟧
 exact (λ z, id₁ z).
    
B: strict_bicat
∏
a b
 c : make_precategory_ob_mor B
       (λ b₁ b₂ : B, B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧),
make_precategory_ob_mor B (λ b₁ b₂ : B, B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧)
⟦ a, b ⟧
→ make_precategory_ob_mor B
    (λ b₁ b₂ : B, B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧) ⟦ b, c ⟧
  → make_precategory_ob_mor B
      (λ b₁ b₂ : B, B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧) ⟦ a, c ⟧
 exact (λ _ _ _ f g, f · g).
Defined.


B: strict_bicat
is_precategory (strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)


B: strict_bicat
is_precategory (strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)

  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), id₁ a · f = f
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · id₁ b = f
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧), f · (g · h) = f · g · h
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧), f · g · h = f · (g · h)

  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), id₁ a · f = f
 exact (λ _ _ f, plunitor (pr22 B) f).
  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · id₁ b = f
 exact (λ _ _ f, prunitor (pr22 B) f).
  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧), f · (g · h) = f · g · h
 exact (λ _ _ _ _ f g h, plassociator (pr22 B) f g h).
  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧), f · g · h = f · (g · h)
 exact (λ _ _ _ _ f g h, prassociator (pr22 B) f g h).
Defined.
(* the definition is exploited further down in Lemma [strict_bicat_to_two_cat_laws] *)



B: strict_bicat
has_homsets (strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)


B: strict_bicat
has_homsets (strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)

  exact (pr12 B).
Qed.


B: strict_bicat
two_cat_data


B: strict_bicat
two_cat_data

  
B: strict_bicat
precategory_data
B: strict_bicat
(λ C : precategory_data,
 ∑ cells_C : ∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU,
 (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧), cells_C x y f f)
 × (∏ (x y : C) (f g h : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
    cells_C x y f g
    → cells_C x y g h → cells_C x y f h)
   × (∏ (x y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
      (g1 g2 : C ⟦ y, z ⟧),
      cells_C y z g1 g2
      → cells_C x z (f · g1) (f · g2))
     × (∏ (x y z : C) (f1 f2 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y, z ⟧),
        cells_C x y f1 f2
        → cells_C x z (f1 · g) (f2 · g))) ?pr1

  
B: strict_bicat
precategory_data
 exact (strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B).
  
B: strict_bicat
(λ C : precategory_data,
 ∑ cells_C : ∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU,
 (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧), cells_C x y f f)
 × (∏ (x y : C) (f g h : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
    cells_C x y f g
    → cells_C x y g h → cells_C x y f h)
   × (∏ (x y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
      (g1 g2 : C ⟦ y, z ⟧),
      cells_C y z g1 g2
      → cells_C x z (f · g1) (f · g2))
     × (∏ (x y z : C) (f1 f2 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
        (g : C ⟦ y, z ⟧),
        cells_C x y f1 f2
        → cells_C x z (f1 · g) (f2 · g)))
  (strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)
 
B: strict_bicat
∏ x y : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B,
strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧
→ strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU
B: strict_bicat
(λ cells_C : ∏
             x y : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B,
             strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y
             ⟧
             → strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x,
               y ⟧ → UU,
 (∏ (x y : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)
  (f : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
  cells_C x y f f)
 × (∏ (x y : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)
    (f g
     h : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
    cells_C x y f g
    → cells_C x y g h → cells_C x y f h)
   × (∏ (x y z : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)
      (f : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧)
      (g1
       g2 : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ y, z
            ⟧),
      cells_C y z g1 g2
      → cells_C x z (f · g1) (f · g2))
     × (∏ (x y z : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)
        (f1
         f2 : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x,
              y ⟧)
        (g : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ y, z
             ⟧),
        cells_C x y f1 f2
        → cells_C x z (f1 · g) (f2 · g))) ?pr1

    
B: strict_bicat
∏ x y : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B,
strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧
→ strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU
 exact (λ _ _ f g, f ==> g).
    
B: strict_bicat
(λ cells_C : ∏
             x y : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B,
             strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y
             ⟧
             → strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x,
               y ⟧ → UU,
 (∏ (x y : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)
  (f : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
  cells_C x y f f)
 × (∏ (x y : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)
    (f g
     h : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
    cells_C x y f g
    → cells_C x y g h → cells_C x y f h)
   × (∏ (x y z : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)
      (f : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧)
      (g1
       g2 : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ y, z
            ⟧),
      cells_C y z g1 g2
      → cells_C x z (f · g1) (f · g2))
     × (∏ (x y z : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)
        (f1
         f2 : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x,
              y ⟧)
        (g : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ y, z
             ⟧),
        cells_C x y f1 f2
        → cells_C x z (f1 · g) (f2 · g)))
  (λ (x y : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)
   (f g : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   f ==> g)
 
B: strict_bicat
∏ (x y : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)
(f : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
f ==> f
B: strict_bicat
∏ (x y : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)
(f g h : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
f ==> g → g ==> h → f ==> h
B: strict_bicat
∏ (x y z : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)
(f : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g1 g2 : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ y, z ⟧),
g1 ==> g2 → f · g1 ==> f · g2
B: strict_bicat
∏ (x y z : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)
(f1 f2 : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f1 ==> f2 → f1 · g ==> f2 · g

      
B: strict_bicat
∏ (x y : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)
(f : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
f ==> f
 exact (λ _ _ f, id₂ f).
      
B: strict_bicat
∏ (x y : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)
(f g h : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
f ==> g → g ==> h → f ==> h
 exact (λ _ _ _ _ _ α β, α • β).
      
B: strict_bicat
∏ (x y z : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)
(f : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g1 g2 : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ y, z ⟧),
g1 ==> g2 → f · g1 ==> f · g2
 exact (λ _ _ _ f _ _ α, f ◃ α).
      
B: strict_bicat
∏ (x y z : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B)
(f1 f2 : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : strict_bicat_to_precategory_data B ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f1 ==> f2 → f1 · g ==> f2 · g
 exact (λ _ _ _ _ _ g α, α ▹ g).
Defined.


B: strict_bicat
two_cat_category


B: strict_bicat
two_cat_category

  
B: strict_bicat
two_cat_data
B: strict_bicat
(λ C : two_cat_data, is_precategory C × has_homsets C)
  ?pr1

  
B: strict_bicat
two_cat_data
 exact (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_data B).
  
B: strict_bicat
(λ C : two_cat_data, is_precategory C × has_homsets C)
  (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_data B)
 
B: strict_bicat
is_precategory (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_data B)
B: strict_bicat
has_homsets (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_data B)

    
B: strict_bicat
is_precategory (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_data B)
 exact (strict_bicat_to_precategory_is_precategory B).
    
B: strict_bicat
has_homsets (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_data B)
 exact (strict_bicat_to_precategory_has_homsets B).
Defined.


B: strict_bicat
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
p: f = g
idto2mor p = pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 f g p)


B: strict_bicat
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
p: f = g
idto2mor p = pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 f g p)

  
B: strict_bicat
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
idto2mor (idpath f) = pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: strict_bicat
two_cat_laws (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)


B: strict_bicat
two_cat_laws (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)

  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f g : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g),
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (TwoCategories.id2 f) x = x
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f g : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g),
TwoCategories.vcomp2 x (TwoCategories.id2 g) = x
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f g h
 k : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g)
(y : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) g h)
(z : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) h k),
TwoCategories.vcomp2 x (TwoCategories.vcomp2 y z) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (TwoCategories.vcomp2 x y) z
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧),
TwoCategories.lwhisker f (TwoCategories.id2 g) =
TwoCategories.id2 (f · g)
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧),
TwoCategories.rwhisker g (TwoCategories.id2 f) =
TwoCategories.id2 (f · g)
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g h i : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) g h)
(y : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) h i),
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (TwoCategories.lwhisker f x)
  (TwoCategories.lwhisker f y) =
TwoCategories.lwhisker f (TwoCategories.vcomp2 x y)
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f g h : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(i : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g)
(y : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) g h),
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (TwoCategories.rwhisker i x)
  (TwoCategories.rwhisker i y) =
TwoCategories.rwhisker i (TwoCategories.vcomp2 x y)
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f g : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(h i : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g)
(y : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) h i),
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (TwoCategories.rwhisker h x)
  (TwoCategories.lwhisker g y) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (TwoCategories.lwhisker f y)
  (TwoCategories.rwhisker i x)
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f g : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g),
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.lwhisker (id₁ a) x)
  (idto2mor (id_left g)) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (id_left f)) x
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f g : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g),
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.rwhisker (id₁ b) x)
  (idto2mor (id_right g)) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (id_right f)) x
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c d : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h i : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) h i),
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.lwhisker f
     (TwoCategories.lwhisker g x))
  (idto2mor (assoc f g i)) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f g h))
  (TwoCategories.lwhisker (f · g) x)
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c d : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g h : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) g h),
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.lwhisker f
     (TwoCategories.rwhisker i x))
  (idto2mor (assoc f h i)) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f g i))
  (TwoCategories.rwhisker i
     (TwoCategories.lwhisker f x))
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c d : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f g : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(h : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g),
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f h i))
  (TwoCategories.rwhisker i
     (TwoCategories.rwhisker h x)) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.rwhisker (h · i) x)
  (idto2mor (assoc g h i))

  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f g : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g),
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (TwoCategories.id2 f) x = x
 intros ; apply id2_left.
  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f g : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g),
TwoCategories.vcomp2 x (TwoCategories.id2 g) = x
 intros ; apply id2_right.
  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f g h
 k : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g)
(y : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) g h)
(z : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) h k),
TwoCategories.vcomp2 x (TwoCategories.vcomp2 y z) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (TwoCategories.vcomp2 x y) z
 intros ; apply vassocr.
  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧),
TwoCategories.lwhisker f (TwoCategories.id2 g) =
TwoCategories.id2 (f · g)
 intros ; apply lwhisker_id2.
  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧),
TwoCategories.rwhisker g (TwoCategories.id2 f) =
TwoCategories.id2 (f · g)
 intros ; apply id2_rwhisker.
  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g h i : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) g h)
(y : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) h i),
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (TwoCategories.lwhisker f x)
  (TwoCategories.lwhisker f y) =
TwoCategories.lwhisker f (TwoCategories.vcomp2 x y)
 intros ; apply lwhisker_vcomp.
  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f g h : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(i : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g)
(y : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) g h),
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (TwoCategories.rwhisker i x)
  (TwoCategories.rwhisker i y) =
TwoCategories.rwhisker i (TwoCategories.vcomp2 x y)
 intros ; apply rwhisker_vcomp.
  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f g : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(h i : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g)
(y : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) h i),
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (TwoCategories.rwhisker h x)
  (TwoCategories.lwhisker g y) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (TwoCategories.lwhisker f y)
  (TwoCategories.rwhisker i x)
 intros ; apply vcomp_whisker.
  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f g : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g),
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.lwhisker (id₁ a) x)
  (idto2mor (id_left g)) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (id_left f)) x
 
B: strict_bicat
a, b: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B
f, g: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: two_cat_cells
  (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g
(id₁ a ◃ x) • idto2mor (plunitor (pr22 B) g) =
idto2mor (plunitor (pr22 B) f) • x

    
B: strict_bicat
a, b: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B
f, g: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: two_cat_cells
  (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g
(id₁ a ◃ x)
• pr1
    (idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ a · g) g (plunitor (pr22 B) g)) =
pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ a · f) f (plunitor (pr22 B) f))
• x

    
B: strict_bicat
a, b: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B
f, g: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: two_cat_cells
  (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g
(id₁ a ◃ x) • lunitor g = lunitor f • x

    apply vcomp_lunitor.
  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f g : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g),
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.rwhisker (id₁ b) x)
  (idto2mor (id_right g)) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (id_right f)) x
 
B: strict_bicat
a, b: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B
f, g: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: two_cat_cells
  (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g
(x ▹ id₁ b) • idto2mor (prunitor (pr22 B) g) =
idto2mor (prunitor (pr22 B) f) • x

    
B: strict_bicat
a, b: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B
f, g: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: two_cat_cells
  (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g
(x ▹ id₁ b)
• pr1
    (idtoiso_2_1 (g · id₁ b) g (prunitor (pr22 B) g)) =
pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 (f · id₁ b) f (prunitor (pr22 B) f))
• x

    
B: strict_bicat
a, b: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B
f, g: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: two_cat_cells
  (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g
(x ▹ id₁ b) • runitor g = runitor f • x

    apply vcomp_runitor.
  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c d : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h i : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) h i),
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.lwhisker f
     (TwoCategories.lwhisker g x))
  (idto2mor (assoc f g i)) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f g h))
  (TwoCategories.lwhisker (f · g) x)
 
B: strict_bicat
a, b, c, d: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B
f: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: two_cat_cells
  (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) h i
(f ◃ (g ◃ x)) • idto2mor (plassociator (pr22 B) f g i) =
idto2mor (plassociator (pr22 B) f g h) • (f · g ◃ x)

    
B: strict_bicat
a, b, c, d: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B
f: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: two_cat_cells
  (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) h i
(f ◃ (g ◃ x))
• pr1
    (idtoiso_2_1 (f · (g · i)) (f · g · i)
       (plassociator (pr22 B) f g i)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 (f · (g · h)) (f · g · h)
     (plassociator (pr22 B) f g h)) • (f · g ◃ x)

    
B: strict_bicat
a, b, c, d: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B
f: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: two_cat_cells
  (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) h i
(f ◃ (g ◃ x)) • lassociator f g i =
lassociator f g h • (f · g ◃ x)

    apply lwhisker_lwhisker.
  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c d : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g h : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) g h),
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.lwhisker f
     (TwoCategories.rwhisker i x))
  (idto2mor (assoc f h i)) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f g i))
  (TwoCategories.rwhisker i
     (TwoCategories.lwhisker f x))
 
B: strict_bicat
a, b, c, d: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B
f: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: two_cat_cells
  (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) g h
(f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • idto2mor (plassociator (pr22 B) f h i) =
idto2mor (plassociator (pr22 B) f g i) • ((f ◃ x) ▹ i)

    
B: strict_bicat
a, b, c, d: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B
f: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: two_cat_cells
  (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) g h
(f ◃ (x ▹ i))
• pr1
    (idtoiso_2_1 (f · (h · i)) (f · h · i)
       (plassociator (pr22 B) f h i)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 (f · (g · i)) (f · g · i)
     (plassociator (pr22 B) f g i)) • ((f ◃ x) ▹ i)

    
B: strict_bicat
a, b, c, d: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B
f: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: two_cat_cells
  (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) g h
(f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i =
lassociator f g i • ((f ◃ x) ▹ i)

    apply rwhisker_lwhisker.
  
B: strict_bicat
∏ (a b c d : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
(f g : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(h : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(x : two_cat_cells
       (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g),
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f h i))
  (TwoCategories.rwhisker i
     (TwoCategories.rwhisker h x)) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.rwhisker (h · i) x)
  (idto2mor (assoc g h i))
 
B: strict_bicat
a, b, c, d: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B
f, g: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: two_cat_cells
  (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g
idto2mor (plassociator (pr22 B) f h i) • ((x ▹ h) ▹ i) =
(x ▹ h · i) • idto2mor (plassociator (pr22 B) g h i)

    
B: strict_bicat
a, b, c, d: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B
f, g: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: two_cat_cells
  (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 (f · (h · i)) (f · h · i)
     (plassociator (pr22 B) f h i)) • ((x ▹ h) ▹ i) =
(x ▹ h · i)
• pr1
    (idtoiso_2_1 (g · (h · i)) (g · h · i)
       (plassociator (pr22 B) g h i))

    
B: strict_bicat
a, b, c, d: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B
f, g: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: two_cat_cells
  (pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)) f g
lassociator f h i • ((x ▹ h) ▹ i) =
(x ▹ h · i) • lassociator g h i

    apply rwhisker_rwhisker.
Qed.


B: strict_bicat
two_cat


B: strict_bicat
two_cat

  
B: strict_bicat
two_precat
B: strict_bicat
(λ C : two_precat, TwoCategories.isaset_cells C) ?pr1

  
B: strict_bicat
two_precat
 
B: strict_bicat
two_cat_category
B: strict_bicat
(λ C : two_cat_category, two_cat_laws C) ?pr1

    
B: strict_bicat
two_cat_category
 exact (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B).
    
B: strict_bicat
(λ C : two_cat_category, two_cat_laws C)
  (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B)
 exact (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_laws B).
  
B: strict_bicat
(λ C : two_precat, TwoCategories.isaset_cells C)
  (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B,,
   strict_bicat_to_two_cat_laws B)
 
B: strict_bicat
x, y: strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B,,
strict_bicat_to_two_cat_laws B
f, g: (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category B,,
 strict_bicat_to_two_cat_laws B) ⟦ x, y ⟧
isaset
  (two_cat_cells (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_data B) f g)

    apply (pr1 B).
Defined.

(** Univalent 2-categories *)

B: strict_bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
isaprop (invertible_2cell f g)


B: strict_bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
isaprop (invertible_2cell f g)

  
B: strict_bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
isofhlevel 1 (f = g)

  exact (pr12 B _ _ f g).
Qed.

(** Univalent categories do not form a 2-category *)

HSET_univalent_category ⟶ HSET_univalent_category


HSET_univalent_category ⟶ HSET_univalent_category

  
functor_data HSET_univalent_category
  HSET_univalent_category
is_functor ?F

  
functor_data HSET_univalent_category
  HSET_univalent_category
 
HSET_univalent_category → HSET_univalent_category
∏ a b : HSET_univalent_category,
HSET_univalent_category ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ HSET_univalent_category ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

    
HSET_univalent_category → HSET_univalent_category
 exact (λ X, setdirprod X X).
    
∏ a b : HSET_univalent_category,
HSET_univalent_category ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ HSET_univalent_category
  ⟦ (λ X : HSET_univalent_category, setdirprod X X) a,
  (λ X : HSET_univalent_category, setdirprod X X) b ⟧
 exact (λ _ _ f x, f (pr1 x) ,, f (pr2 x)).
  
is_functor
  (make_functor_data
     (λ X : HSET_univalent_category, setdirprod X X)
     (λ (a b : HSET_univalent_category)
      (f : HSET_univalent_category ⟦ a, b ⟧)
      (x : (λ X : HSET_univalent_category,
            setdirprod X X) a), f (pr1 x),, f (pr2 x)))
 
functor_idax
  (make_functor_data
     (λ X : HSET_univalent_category, setdirprod X X)
     (λ (a b : HSET_univalent_category)
      (f : HSET_univalent_category ⟦ a, b ⟧)
      (x : setdirprod a a), f (pr1 x),, f (pr2 x)))
functor_compax
  (make_functor_data
     (λ X : HSET_univalent_category, setdirprod X X)
     (λ (a b : HSET_univalent_category)
      (f : HSET_univalent_category ⟦ a, b ⟧)
      (x : setdirprod a a), f (pr1 x),, f (pr2 x)))

    
functor_idax
  (make_functor_data
     (λ X : HSET_univalent_category, setdirprod X X)
     (λ (a b : HSET_univalent_category)
      (f : HSET_univalent_category ⟦ a, b ⟧)
      (x : setdirprod a a), f (pr1 x),, f (pr2 x)))
 
X: HSET_univalent_category
# (make_functor_data
     (λ X : HSET_univalent_category, setdirprod X X)
     (λ (a b : HSET_univalent_category)
      (f : HSET_univalent_category ⟦ a, b ⟧)
      (x : setdirprod a a), f (pr1 x),, f (pr2 x)))
  (id₁ X) =
id₁
  (make_functor_data
     (λ X : HSET_univalent_category, setdirprod X X)
     (λ (a b : HSET_univalent_category)
      (f : HSET_univalent_category ⟦ a, b ⟧)
      (x : setdirprod a a), f (pr1 x),, f (pr2 x)) X)

      apply idpath.
    
functor_compax
  (make_functor_data
     (λ X : HSET_univalent_category, setdirprod X X)
     (λ (a b : HSET_univalent_category)
      (f : HSET_univalent_category ⟦ a, b ⟧)
      (x : setdirprod a a), f (pr1 x),, f (pr2 x)))
 
X, Y, Z: HSET_univalent_category
f: HSET_univalent_category ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: HSET_univalent_category ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
# (make_functor_data
     (λ X : HSET_univalent_category, setdirprod X X)
     (λ (a b : HSET_univalent_category)
      (f : HSET_univalent_category ⟦ a, b ⟧)
      (x : setdirprod a a), f (pr1 x),, f (pr2 x)))
  (f · g) =
# (make_functor_data
     (λ X : HSET_univalent_category, setdirprod X X)
     (λ (a b : HSET_univalent_category)
      (f : HSET_univalent_category ⟦ a, b ⟧)
      (x : setdirprod a a), f (pr1 x),, f (pr2 x))) f
· # (make_functor_data
       (λ X : HSET_univalent_category, setdirprod X X)
       (λ (a b : HSET_univalent_category)
        (f : HSET_univalent_category ⟦ a, b ⟧)
        (x : setdirprod a a), f (pr1 x),, f (pr2 x)))
    g

      apply idpath.
Defined.


nat_z_iso diag_set diag_set


nat_z_iso diag_set diag_set

  
diag_set ⟹ diag_set
is_nat_z_iso ?μ

  
diag_set ⟹ diag_set
 
nat_trans_data diag_set diag_set
is_nat_trans diag_set diag_set ?t

    
nat_trans_data diag_set diag_set
 
X: HSET_univalent_category
x: diag_set X
diag_set X

      exact (pr2 x ,, pr1 x).
    
is_nat_trans diag_set diag_set
  ((λ X : HSET_univalent_category,
    (λ x : diag_set X, pr2 x,, pr1 x)
    :
    HSET_univalent_category ⟦ diag_set X, diag_set X ⟧)
   :
   nat_trans_data diag_set diag_set)
 
X, Y: HSET_univalent_category
f: HSET_univalent_category ⟦ X, Y ⟧
# diag_set f · (λ x : diag_set Y, pr2 x,, pr1 x) =
(λ x : diag_set X, pr2 x,, pr1 x) · # diag_set f

      apply idpath.
  
is_nat_z_iso
  (make_nat_trans diag_set diag_set
     ((λ X : HSET_univalent_category,
       (λ x : diag_set X, pr2 x,, pr1 x)
       :
       HSET_univalent_category ⟦ diag_set X,
       diag_set X ⟧)
      :
      nat_trans_data diag_set diag_set)
     ((λ (X Y : HSET_univalent_category)
       (f : HSET_univalent_category ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
       idpath
         ((λ x : diag_set X, pr2 x,, pr1 x)
          · # diag_set f))
      :
      is_nat_trans diag_set diag_set
        ((λ X : HSET_univalent_category,
          (λ x : diag_set X, pr2 x,, pr1 x)
          :
          HSET_univalent_category ⟦ diag_set X,
          diag_set X ⟧)
         :
         nat_trans_data diag_set diag_set)))
 
X: HSET_univalent_category
is_z_isomorphism
  (make_nat_trans diag_set diag_set
     (λ (X : HSET_univalent_category)
      (x : diag_set X), pr2 x,, pr1 x)
     (λ (X Y : HSET_univalent_category)
      (f : HSET_univalent_category ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
      idpath
        ((λ x : diag_set X, pr2 x,, pr1 x)
         · # diag_set f)) X)

    
X: HSET_univalent_category
is_z_isomorphism (λ x : X × X, pr2 x,, pr1 x)

    
X: HSET_univalent_category
hset_precategory_data ⟦ setdirprod X X, setdirprod X X
⟧
X: HSET_univalent_category
(λ g : hset_precategory_data ⟦ setdirprod X X,
       setdirprod X X ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat (λ x : X × X, pr2 x,, pr1 x) g)
  ?pr1

    
X: HSET_univalent_category
hset_precategory_data ⟦ setdirprod X X, setdirprod X X
⟧
 exact (λ z, pr2 z ,, pr1 z).
    
X: HSET_univalent_category
(λ g : hset_precategory_data ⟦ setdirprod X X,
       setdirprod X X ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat (λ x : X × X, pr2 x,, pr1 x) g)
  (λ z : setdirprod X X, pr2 z,, pr1 z)
 
X: HSET_univalent_category
(λ x : X × X, pr2 x,, pr1 x)
· (λ z : setdirprod X X, pr2 z,, pr1 z) =
id₁ (setdirprod X X)
X: HSET_univalent_category
(λ z : setdirprod X X, pr2 z,, pr1 z)
· (λ x : X × X, pr2 x,, pr1 x) = id₁ (setdirprod X X)

      
X: HSET_univalent_category
(λ x : X × X, pr2 x,, pr1 x)
· (λ z : setdirprod X X, pr2 z,, pr1 z) =
id₁ (setdirprod X X)
 apply idpath.
      
X: HSET_univalent_category
(λ z : setdirprod X X, pr2 z,, pr1 z)
· (λ x : X × X, pr2 x,, pr1 x) = id₁ (setdirprod X X)
 apply idpath.
Defined.


¬ is_strict_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats


¬ is_strict_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats

  
H: is_strict_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats
∅

  
H: is_strict_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats
C:= maponpaths pr1
  (eqtohomot
     (nat_trans_eq_pointwise
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑ η : diag_set ==> diag_set,
                  is_invertible_2cell η, pr1 z)
           (proofirrelevance
              (invertible_2cell diag_set diag_set)
              (univalent_two_cat_2cells_are_prop
                 (bicat_of_univ_cats,, H)
                 univalent_cat_is_univalent_2_1
                 diag_set diag_set)
              (id2_invertible_2cell diag_set)
              (nat_z_iso_to_invertible_2cell
                 diag_set diag_set swap))) boolset)
     (true,, false)): pr1
  (pr1 (id2_invertible_2cell diag_set) boolset
     (true,, false)) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (nat_z_iso_to_invertible_2cell diag_set
        diag_set swap) boolset (true,, false))
∅

  exact (nopathstruetofalse C).
Qed.

(** Local univalence gives rise to a unique strictness structure *)

B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
strictness_structure B


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
strictness_structure B

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), id₁ a · f = f
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · id₁ b = f
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
(λ _ : ∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · id₁ b = f,
 ∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧), f · (g · h) = f · g · h) ?pr10
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ a · f) f
     (plunitor (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) f)) = lunitor f
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 (f · id₁ b) f
     (prunitor (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) f)) = runitor f
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
(λ _ : ∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
       pr1
         (idtoiso_2_1 (f · id₁ b) f
            (prunitor (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) f)) =
       runitor f,
 ∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧),
 pr1
   (idtoiso_2_1 (f · (g · h)) (f · g · h)
      (plassociator (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) f g h)) =
 lassociator f g h) ?pr12

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), id₁ a · f = f
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
o, o0: B
f: B ⟦ o, o0 ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (lunitor f)

    is_iso.
  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · id₁ b = f
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
o, o0: B
f: B ⟦ o, o0 ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (runitor f)

    is_iso.
  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
(λ _ : ∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · id₁ b = f,
 ∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧), f · (g · h) = f · g · h)
  (λ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
   isotoid_2_1 HB
     (runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f))
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
o, o0, o1, o2: B
f: B ⟦ o, o0 ⟧
g: B ⟦ o0, o1 ⟧
h: B ⟦ o1, o2 ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (lassociator f g h)

    is_iso.
  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ a · f) f
     (plunitor
        ((λ (a0 b0 : B) (f0 : B ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
          isotoid_2_1 HB
            (lunitor f0,,
             is_invertible_2cell_lunitor f0)),,
         (λ (a0 b0 : B) (f0 : B ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
          isotoid_2_1 HB
            (runitor f0,,
             is_invertible_2cell_runitor f0)),,
         (λ (a0 b0 c d : B) (f0 : B ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧)
          (g : B ⟦ b0, c ⟧) (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧),
          isotoid_2_1 HB
            (lassociator f0 g h,,
             is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f0 g h)))
        f)) = lunitor f
 abstract
      (cbn ; intros ;
       rewrite idtoiso_2_1_isotoid_2_1 ;
       apply idpath).
  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 (f · id₁ b) f
     (prunitor
        ((λ (a0 b0 : B) (f0 : B ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
          isotoid_2_1 HB
            (lunitor f0,,
             is_invertible_2cell_lunitor f0)),,
         (λ (a0 b0 : B) (f0 : B ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
          isotoid_2_1 HB
            (runitor f0,,
             is_invertible_2cell_runitor f0)),,
         (λ (a0 b0 c d : B) (f0 : B ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧)
          (g : B ⟦ b0, c ⟧) (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧),
          isotoid_2_1 HB
            (lassociator f0 g h,,
             is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f0 g h)))
        f)) = runitor f
 abstract
      (cbn ; intros ;
       rewrite idtoiso_2_1_isotoid_2_1 ;
       apply idpath).
  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
(λ _ : ∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
       pr1
         (idtoiso_2_1 (f · id₁ b) f
            (prunitor
               ((λ (a0 b0 : B) (f0 : B ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                 isotoid_2_1 HB
                   (lunitor f0,,
                    is_invertible_2cell_lunitor f0)),,
                (λ (a0 b0 : B) (f0 : B ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                 isotoid_2_1 HB
                   (runitor f0,,
                    is_invertible_2cell_runitor f0)),,
                (λ (a0 b0 c d : B) (f0 : B ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧)
                 (g : B ⟦ b0, c ⟧) (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                 isotoid_2_1 HB
                   (lassociator f0 g h,,
                    is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f0
                      g h))) f)) = runitor f,
 ∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧),
 pr1
   (idtoiso_2_1 (f · (g · h)) (f · g · h)
      (plassociator
         ((λ (a0 b0 : B) (f0 : B ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
           isotoid_2_1 HB
             (lunitor f0,,
              is_invertible_2cell_lunitor f0)),,
          (λ (a0 b0 : B) (f0 : B ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
           isotoid_2_1 HB
             (runitor f0,,
              is_invertible_2cell_runitor f0)),,
          (λ (a0 b0 c0 d0 : B) (f0 : B ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧)
           (g0 : B ⟦ b0, c0 ⟧) (h0 : B ⟦ c0, d0 ⟧),
           isotoid_2_1 HB
             (lassociator f0 g0 h0,,
              is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f0 g0 h0)))
         f g h)) = lassociator f g h)
  (strictness_from_univalent_2_1_subproof0 B HB)
 abstract
      (cbn ; intros ;
       rewrite idtoiso_2_1_isotoid_2_1 ;
       apply idpath).
Defined.


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
is_coh_strictness_structure
  (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB)


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
is_coh_strictness_structure
  (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB)

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧),
maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ b, c ⟧, f · z)
  (plunitor (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB) g) =
plassociator (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB) f
  (id₁ b) g @
maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ a, b ⟧, z · g)
  (prunitor (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB) f)
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
∏ (v w x y z : B) (f : B ⟦ v, w ⟧) (g : B ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (k : B ⟦ y, z ⟧),
maponpaths (λ z0 : B ⟦ w, z ⟧, f · z0)
  (plassociator (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB) g h
     k) @
plassociator (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB) f
  (g · h) k @
maponpaths (λ z0 : B ⟦ v, y ⟧, z0 · k)
  (plassociator (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB) f g
     h) =
plassociator (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB) f g
  (h · k) @
plassociator (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB)
  (f · g) h k

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧),
maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ b, c ⟧, f · z)
  (plunitor (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB) g) =
plassociator (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB) f
  (id₁ b) g @
maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ a, b ⟧, z · g)
  (prunitor (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB) f)
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ b, c ⟧, f · z)
  (isotoid_2_1 HB
     (lunitor g,, is_invertible_2cell_lunitor g)) =
isotoid_2_1 HB
  (lassociator f (id₁ b) g,,
   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (id₁ b) g) @
maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ a, b ⟧, z · g)
  (isotoid_2_1 HB
     (runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f))

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
isotoid_2_1 HB
  ((f ◃ (lunitor g,, is_invertible_2cell_lunitor g)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f
     (pr2 (lunitor g,, is_invertible_2cell_lunitor g))) =
isotoid_2_1 HB
  (lassociator f (id₁ b) g,,
   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (id₁ b) g) @
maponpaths (λ z : B ⟦ a, b ⟧, z · g)
  (isotoid_2_1 HB
     (runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f))

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
isotoid_2_1 HB
  ((f ◃ (lunitor g,, is_invertible_2cell_lunitor g)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f
     (pr2 (lunitor g,, is_invertible_2cell_lunitor g))) =
isotoid_2_1 HB
  (lassociator f (id₁ b) g,,
   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (id₁ b) g) @
isotoid_2_1 HB
  (((runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f) ▹ g),,
   is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g
     (pr2 (runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f)))

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
isotoid_2_1 HB
  ((f ◃ (lunitor g,, is_invertible_2cell_lunitor g)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f
     (pr2 (lunitor g,, is_invertible_2cell_lunitor g))) =
isotoid_2_1 HB
  (((lassociator f (id₁ b) g,,
     is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (id₁ b) g)
    • (((runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f)
        ▹ g),,
       is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g
         (pr2
            (runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f)))),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (pr2
        (lassociator f (id₁ b) g,,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (id₁ b) g))
     (pr2
        (((runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f)
          ▹ g),,
         is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g
           (pr2
              (runitor f,,
               is_invertible_2cell_runitor f)))))

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
(f ◃ (lunitor g,, is_invertible_2cell_lunitor g)),,
is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f
  (pr2 (lunitor g,, is_invertible_2cell_lunitor g)) =
((lassociator f (id₁ b) g,,
  is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (id₁ b) g)
 • (((runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f) ▹ g),,
    is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g
      (pr2 (runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f)))),,
is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
  (pr2
     (lassociator f (id₁ b) g,,
      is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (id₁ b) g))
  (pr2
     (((runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f) ▹ g),,
      is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g
        (pr2
           (runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f))))

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr1
  ((f ◃ (lunitor g,, is_invertible_2cell_lunitor g)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f
     (pr2 (lunitor g,, is_invertible_2cell_lunitor g))) =
pr1
  (((lassociator f (id₁ b) g,,
     is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (id₁ b) g)
    • (((runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f)
        ▹ g),,
       is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g
         (pr2
            (runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f)))),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (pr2
        (lassociator f (id₁ b) g,,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (id₁ b) g))
     (pr2
        (((runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f)
          ▹ g),,
         is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g
           (pr2
              (runitor f,,
               is_invertible_2cell_runitor f)))))

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
 intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell. 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr1
  ((f ◃ (lunitor g,, is_invertible_2cell_lunitor g)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f
     (pr2 (lunitor g,, is_invertible_2cell_lunitor g))) =
pr1
  (((lassociator f (id₁ b) g,,
     is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (id₁ b) g)
    • (((runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f)
        ▹ g),,
       is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g
         (pr2
            (runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f)))),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (pr2
        (lassociator f (id₁ b) g,,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (id₁ b) g))
     (pr2
        (((runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f)
          ▹ g),,
         is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g
           (pr2
              (runitor f,,
               is_invertible_2cell_runitor f)))))

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
f ◃ lunitor g =
lassociator f (id₁ b) g • (runitor f ▹ g)

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
lassociator f (id₁ b) g • (runitor f ▹ g) =
f ◃ lunitor g

    apply runitor_rwhisker.
  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
∏ (v w x y z : B) (f : B ⟦ v, w ⟧) (g : B ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (k : B ⟦ y, z ⟧),
maponpaths (λ z0 : B ⟦ w, z ⟧, f · z0)
  (plassociator (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB) g h
     k) @
plassociator (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB) f
  (g · h) k @
maponpaths (λ z0 : B ⟦ v, y ⟧, z0 · k)
  (plassociator (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB) f g
     h) =
plassociator (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB) f g
  (h · k) @
plassociator (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB)
  (f · g) h k
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
v, w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ v, w ⟧
g: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
k: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
maponpaths (λ z0 : B ⟦ w, z ⟧, f · z0)
  (isotoid_2_1 HB
     (lassociator g h k,,
      is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k)) @
isotoid_2_1 HB
  (lassociator f (g · h) k,,
   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (g · h) k) @
maponpaths (λ z0 : B ⟦ v, y ⟧, z0 · k)
  (isotoid_2_1 HB
     (lassociator f g h,,
      is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)) =
isotoid_2_1 HB
  (lassociator f g (h · k),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g (h · k)) @
isotoid_2_1 HB
  (lassociator (f · g) h k,,
   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (f · g) h k)

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
v, w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ v, w ⟧
g: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
k: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
isotoid_2_1 HB
  ((f
    ◃ (lassociator g h k,,
       is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f
     (pr2
        (lassociator g h k,,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k))) @
isotoid_2_1 HB
  (lassociator f (g · h) k,,
   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (g · h) k) @
maponpaths (λ z0 : B ⟦ v, y ⟧, z0 · k)
  (isotoid_2_1 HB
     (lassociator f g h,,
      is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)) =
isotoid_2_1 HB
  (lassociator f g (h · k),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g (h · k)) @
isotoid_2_1 HB
  (lassociator (f · g) h k,,
   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (f · g) h k)

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
v, w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ v, w ⟧
g: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
k: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
isotoid_2_1 HB
  ((f
    ◃ (lassociator g h k,,
       is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f
     (pr2
        (lassociator g h k,,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k))) @
isotoid_2_1 HB
  (lassociator f (g · h) k,,
   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (g · h) k) @
isotoid_2_1 HB
  (((lassociator f g h,,
     is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h) ▹ k),,
   is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker k
     (pr2
        (lassociator f g h,,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h))) =
isotoid_2_1 HB
  (lassociator f g (h · k),,
   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g (h · k)) @
isotoid_2_1 HB
  (lassociator (f · g) h k,,
   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (f · g) h k)

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
v, w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ v, w ⟧
g: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
k: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
isotoid_2_1 HB
  ((((f
      ◃ (lassociator g h k,,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k)),,
     is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f
       (pr2
          (lassociator g h k,,
           is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k)))
    • (((lassociator f (g · h) k,,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (g · h) k)
        • (((lassociator f g h,,
             is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)
            ▹ k),,
           is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker k
             (pr2
                (lassociator f g h,,
                 is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)))),,
       is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
         (pr2
            (lassociator f (g · h) k,,
             is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (g · h)
               k))
         (pr2
            (((lassociator f g h,,
               is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)
              ▹ k),,
             is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker k
               (pr2
                  (lassociator f g h,,
                   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g
                     h)))))),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (pr2
        ((f
          ◃ (lassociator g h k,,
             is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k)),,
         is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f
           (pr2
              (lassociator g h k,,
               is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k))))
     (pr2
        (((lassociator f (g · h) k,,
           is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (g · h) k)
          • (((lassociator f g h,,
               is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)
              ▹ k),,
             is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker k
               (pr2
                  (lassociator f g h,,
                   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g
                     h)))),,
         is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (pr2
              (lassociator f (g · h) k,,
               is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f
                 (g · h) k))
           (pr2
              (((lassociator f g h,,
                 is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)
                ▹ k),,
               is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker k
                 (pr2
                    (lassociator f g h,,
                     is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f
                       g h))))))) =
isotoid_2_1 HB
  (((lassociator f g (h · k),,
     is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g (h · k))
    • (lassociator (f · g) h k,,
       is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (f · g) h k)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (pr2
        (lassociator f g (h · k),,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g (h · k)))
     (pr2
        (lassociator (f · g) h k,,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (f · g) h k)))

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
v, w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ v, w ⟧
g: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
k: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
(((f
   ◃ (lassociator g h k,,
      is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k)),,
  is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f
    (pr2
       (lassociator g h k,,
        is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k)))
 • (((lassociator f (g · h) k,,
      is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (g · h) k)
     • (((lassociator f g h,,
          is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h) ▹ k),,
        is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker k
          (pr2
             (lassociator f g h,,
              is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)))),,
    is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
      (pr2
         (lassociator f (g · h) k,,
          is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (g · h) k))
      (pr2
         (((lassociator f g h,,
            is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h) ▹ k),,
          is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker k
            (pr2
               (lassociator f g h,,
                is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)))))),,
is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
  (pr2
     ((f
       ◃ (lassociator g h k,,
          is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k)),,
      is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f
        (pr2
           (lassociator g h k,,
            is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k))))
  (pr2
     (((lassociator f (g · h) k,,
        is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (g · h) k)
       • (((lassociator f g h,,
            is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h) ▹ k),,
          is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker k
            (pr2
               (lassociator f g h,,
                is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)))),,
      is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (pr2
           (lassociator f (g · h) k,,
            is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (g · h)
              k))
        (pr2
           (((lassociator f g h,,
              is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)
             ▹ k),,
            is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker k
              (pr2
                 (lassociator f g h,,
                  is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g
                    h)))))) =
((lassociator f g (h · k),,
  is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g (h · k))
 • (lassociator (f · g) h k,,
    is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (f · g) h k)),,
is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
  (pr2
     (lassociator f g (h · k),,
      is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g (h · k)))
  (pr2
     (lassociator (f · g) h k,,
      is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (f · g) h k))

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
v, w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ v, w ⟧
g: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
k: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
v, w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ v, w ⟧
g: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
k: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  ((((f
      ◃ (lassociator g h k,,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k)),,
     is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f
       (pr2
          (lassociator g h k,,
           is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k)))
    • (((lassociator f (g · h) k,,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (g · h) k)
        • (((lassociator f g h,,
             is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)
            ▹ k),,
           is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker k
             (pr2
                (lassociator f g h,,
                 is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)))),,
       is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
         (pr2
            (lassociator f (g · h) k,,
             is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (g · h)
               k))
         (pr2
            (((lassociator f g h,,
               is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)
              ▹ k),,
             is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker k
               (pr2
                  (lassociator f g h,,
                   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g
                     h)))))),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (pr2
        ((f
          ◃ (lassociator g h k,,
             is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k)),,
         is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f
           (pr2
              (lassociator g h k,,
               is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k))))
     (pr2
        (((lassociator f (g · h) k,,
           is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (g · h) k)
          • (((lassociator f g h,,
               is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)
              ▹ k),,
             is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker k
               (pr2
                  (lassociator f g h,,
                   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g
                     h)))),,
         is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (pr2
              (lassociator f (g · h) k,,
               is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f
                 (g · h) k))
           (pr2
              (((lassociator f g h,,
                 is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)
                ▹ k),,
               is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker k
                 (pr2
                    (lassociator f g h,,
                     is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f
                       g h))))))) =
pr1
  (((lassociator f g (h · k),,
     is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g (h · k))
    • (lassociator (f · g) h k,,
       is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (f · g) h k)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (pr2
        (lassociator f g (h · k),,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g (h · k)))
     (pr2
        (lassociator (f · g) h k,,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (f · g) h k)))

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
v, w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ v, w ⟧
g: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
k: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
 intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell. 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
v, w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ v, w ⟧
g: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
k: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  ((((f
      ◃ (lassociator g h k,,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k)),,
     is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f
       (pr2
          (lassociator g h k,,
           is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k)))
    • (((lassociator f (g · h) k,,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (g · h) k)
        • (((lassociator f g h,,
             is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)
            ▹ k),,
           is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker k
             (pr2
                (lassociator f g h,,
                 is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)))),,
       is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
         (pr2
            (lassociator f (g · h) k,,
             is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (g · h)
               k))
         (pr2
            (((lassociator f g h,,
               is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)
              ▹ k),,
             is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker k
               (pr2
                  (lassociator f g h,,
                   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g
                     h)))))),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (pr2
        ((f
          ◃ (lassociator g h k,,
             is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k)),,
         is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f
           (pr2
              (lassociator g h k,,
               is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g h k))))
     (pr2
        (((lassociator f (g · h) k,,
           is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f (g · h) k)
          • (((lassociator f g h,,
               is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)
              ▹ k),,
             is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker k
               (pr2
                  (lassociator f g h,,
                   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g
                     h)))),,
         is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (pr2
              (lassociator f (g · h) k,,
               is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f
                 (g · h) k))
           (pr2
              (((lassociator f g h,,
                 is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)
                ▹ k),,
               is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker k
                 (pr2
                    (lassociator f g h,,
                     is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f
                       g h))))))) =
pr1
  (((lassociator f g (h · k),,
     is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g (h · k))
    • (lassociator (f · g) h k,,
       is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (f · g) h k)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (pr2
        (lassociator f g (h · k),,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g (h · k)))
     (pr2
        (lassociator (f · g) h k,,
         is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (f · g) h k)))

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
v, w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ v, w ⟧
g: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
k: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
(f ◃ lassociator g h k)
• (lassociator f (g · h) k • (lassociator f g h ▹ k)) =
lassociator f g (h · k) • lassociator (f · g) h k

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
v, w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ v, w ⟧
g: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
k: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
((f ◃ lassociator g h k) • lassociator f (g · h) k)
• (lassociator f g h ▹ k) =
lassociator f g (h · k) • lassociator (f · g) h k

    apply lassociator_lassociator.
Qed.


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
coh_strictness_structure B


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
coh_strictness_structure B

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
strictness_structure B
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
(λ S : strictness_structure B,
 is_coh_strictness_structure S) ?pr1

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
strictness_structure B
 exact (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB).
  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
(λ S : strictness_structure B,
 is_coh_strictness_structure S)
  (strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB)
 exact (is_coh_strictness_from_univalent_2_1 HB).
Defined.

pr1 S₁ = pr1 S₂

 exact (isPredicate_is_coh_strictness_structure HB).

pr11 S₁ = pr11 S₂
