C: two_cat
x, y: pr1 C
f, g: pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
idto2mor p =
transportf (two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f) p
  (TwoCategories.id2 f)


C: two_cat
x, y: pr1 C
f, g: pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
idto2mor p =
transportf (two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f) p
  (TwoCategories.id2 f)

  
C: two_cat
x, y: pr1 C
f: pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
idto2mor (idpath f) =
transportf (two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f) (idpath f)
  (TwoCategories.id2 f)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: two_cat
x, y: pr1 C
f, g, h: pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: g = h
α: two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f g
TwoCategories.vcomp2 α
  (transportf (two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) g) p
     (TwoCategories.id2 g)) =
transportf (two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f) p α


C: two_cat
x, y: pr1 C
f, g, h: pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: g = h
α: two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f g
TwoCategories.vcomp2 α
  (transportf (two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) g) p
     (TwoCategories.id2 g)) =
transportf (two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f) p α

  
C: two_cat
x, y: pr1 C
f, g: pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f g
TwoCategories.vcomp2 α
  (transportf (two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) g)
     (idpath g) (TwoCategories.id2 g)) =
transportf (two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f) (idpath g)
  α

  
C: two_cat
x, y: pr1 C
f, g: pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f g
TwoCategories.vcomp2 α (TwoCategories.id2 g) = α

  
C: two_cat
x, y: pr1 C
f, g: pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f g
TwoCategories.vcomp2 α (TwoCategories.id2 g) = α

  
C: two_cat
x, y: pr1 C
f, g: pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f g
α = α

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: two_cat
x, y: pr1 C
f, g, h: pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
α: two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) g h
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (transportf (two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f) p
     (TwoCategories.id2 f)) α =
transportb
  (λ z : pr1 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) z h) p α


C: two_cat
x, y: pr1 C
f, g, h: pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
α: two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) g h
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (transportf (two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f) p
     (TwoCategories.id2 f)) α =
transportb
  (λ z : pr1 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) z h) p α

  
C: two_cat
x, y: pr1 C
f, h: pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f h
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (transportf (two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f)
     (idpath f) (TwoCategories.id2 f)) α =
transportb
  (λ z : pr1 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) z h) (idpath f) α

  
C: two_cat
x, y: pr1 C
f, h: pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f h
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (TwoCategories.id2 f) α = α

  
C: two_cat
x, y: pr1 C
f, h: pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f h
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (TwoCategories.id2 f) α = α

  
C: two_cat
x, y: pr1 C
f, h: pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: two_cat_cells (pr1 (pr1 C)) f h
α = α

  apply idpath.
Qed.



C: two_cat
prebicat_data


C: two_cat
prebicat_data

  
C: two_cat
UU
C: two_cat
?ob → ?ob → UU
C: two_cat
∏ X Y : ?ob, ?mor X Y → ?mor X Y → UU
C: two_cat
∏ X : ?ob, ?mor X X
C: two_cat
∏ X Y Z : ?ob, ?mor X Y → ?mor Y Z → ?mor X Z
C: two_cat
∏ (X Y : ?ob) (f : ?mor X Y), ?cell X Y f f
C: two_cat
∏ (X Y : ?ob) (f g h : ?mor X Y),
?cell X Y f g → ?cell X Y g h → ?cell X Y f h
C: two_cat
∏ (X Y Z : ?ob) (f : ?mor X Y) (g h : ?mor Y Z),
?cell Y Z g h
→ ?cell X Z (?comp X Y Z f g) (?comp X Y Z f h)
C: two_cat
∏ (X Y Z : ?ob) (g h : ?mor X Y) (f : ?mor Y Z),
?cell X Y g h
→ ?cell X Z (?comp X Y Z g f) (?comp X Y Z h f)
C: two_cat
∏ (X Y : ?ob) (f : ?mor X Y),
?cell X Y (?comp X X Y (?id₁ X) f) f
C: two_cat
∏ (X Y : ?ob) (f : ?mor X Y),
?cell X Y f (?comp X X Y (?id₁ X) f)
C: two_cat
∏ (X Y : ?ob) (f : ?mor X Y),
?cell X Y (?comp X Y Y f (?id₁ Y)) f
C: two_cat
∏ (X Y : ?ob) (f : ?mor X Y),
?cell X Y f (?comp X Y Y f (?id₁ Y))
C: two_cat
∏ (W X Y Z : ?ob) (f : ?mor W X) (g : ?mor X Y)
(h : ?mor Y Z),
?cell W Z (?comp W X Z f (?comp X Y Z g h))
  (?comp W Y Z (?comp W X Y f g) h)
C: two_cat
∏ (W X Y Z : ?ob) (f : ?mor W X) (g : ?mor X Y)
(h : ?mor Y Z),
?cell W Z (?comp W Y Z (?comp W X Y f g) h)
  (?comp W X Z f (?comp X Y Z g h))

  
C: two_cat
UU
 apply C.
  
C: two_cat
(let X := pr1 C in
 let X0 := pr1 X in
 let X1 := pr1 X0 in
 let X2 := pr1 X1 in
 let X3 := pr1 X2 in let X4 := pr1 X3 in X4)
→ (let X := pr1 C in
   let X0 := pr1 X in
   let X1 := pr1 X0 in
   let X2 := pr1 X1 in
   let X3 := pr1 X2 in let X4 := pr1 X3 in X4) → UU
 
C: two_cat
pr111 (pr111 C) → pr111 (pr111 C) → UU

    
C: two_cat
x, y: pr111 (pr111 C)
UU

    refine (x --> y).
  
C: two_cat
∏
(X : let X := pr1 C in
     let X0 := pr1 X in
     let X1 := pr1 X0 in
     let X2 := pr1 X1 in
     let X3 := pr1 X2 in let X4 := pr1 X3 in X4)
(Y : let X0 := pr1 C in
     let X1 := pr1 X0 in
     let X2 := pr1 X1 in
     let X3 := pr1 X2 in
     let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5),
((λ x y : pr111 (pr111 C), pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧)
 :
 (let X0 := pr1 C in
  let X1 := pr1 X0 in
  let X2 := pr1 X1 in
  let X3 := pr1 X2 in
  let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
 → (let X0 := pr1 C in
    let X1 := pr1 X0 in
    let X2 := pr1 X1 in
    let X3 := pr1 X2 in
    let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5) → UU)
  X Y
→ ((λ x y : pr111 (pr111 C), pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   :
   (let X0 := pr1 C in
    let X1 := pr1 X0 in
    let X2 := pr1 X1 in
    let X3 := pr1 X2 in
    let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
   → (let X0 := pr1 C in
      let X1 := pr1 X0 in
      let X2 := pr1 X1 in
      let X3 := pr1 X2 in
      let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5) → UU)
    X Y → UU
 
C: two_cat
∏ X Y : pr111 (pr111 C),
pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → UU

    
C: two_cat
X, Y: pr111 (pr111 C)
f, g: pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ X, Y ⟧
UU

    exact (two_cat_cells _ f g).
  
C: two_cat
∏
X : let X := pr1 C in
    let X0 := pr1 X in
    let X1 := pr1 X0 in
    let X2 := pr1 X1 in
    let X3 := pr1 X2 in let X4 := pr1 X3 in X4,
((λ x y : pr111 (pr111 C), pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧)
 :
 (let X0 := pr1 C in
  let X1 := pr1 X0 in
  let X2 := pr1 X1 in
  let X3 := pr1 X2 in
  let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
 → (let X0 := pr1 C in
    let X1 := pr1 X0 in
    let X2 := pr1 X1 in
    let X3 := pr1 X2 in

    refine (TwoCategories.lwhisker f α).

∏
(X : let X := pr1 C in
     let X0 := pr1 X in
     let X1 := pr1 X0 in

  (f0 g0 : pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ X0, Y0 ⟧),

C: two_cat
∏ (X Y Z : pr111 (pr111 C))
(g h : pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(f : pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
two_cat_cells (pr111 C) g h
→ two_cat_cells (pr111 C) (g · f) (h · f)

X, Y, Z: pr111 (pr111 C)
g, h: pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f: pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: two_cat_cells (pr111 C) g h
two_cat_cells (pr111 C) (g · f) (h · f)

    refine (TwoCategories.rwhisker f α).

C: two_cat
∏ (X Y : pr111 (pr111 C))
(f : pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
two_cat_cells (pr111 C) (id₁ X · f) f

    
C: two_cat
X, Y: pr111 (pr111 C)
f: pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ X, Y ⟧
two_cat_cells (pr111 C) (id₁ X · f) f

    
C: two_cat
X, Y: pr111 (pr111 C)
f: pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ X, Y ⟧
id₁ X · f = f

    exact (id_left (f : pr1 C ⟦ X , Y ⟧)).

∏ (X Y : pr111 (pr111 C))
(f : pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ X, Y ⟧),

C: two_cat

f: pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ X, Y ⟧

f: pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f = id₁ X · f

    exact (!id_left (f : pr1 C ⟦ X , Y ⟧)).

∏ (X Y : pr111 (pr111 C))

C: two_cat
X, Y: pr111 (pr111 C)
f: pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f · id₁ Y = f

    exact (id_right (f : pr1 C ⟦ X , Y ⟧)).

        let X5 := pr1 X4 in let X6 := pr1 X5 in X6)
       → UU) X0 Y0

∏ (W X Y Z : pr111 (pr111 C))
(f : pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ W, X ⟧)
(g : pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(h : pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),

C: two_cat
∏ (W X Y Z : pr111 (pr111 C))
(f : pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ W, X ⟧)
(g : pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(h : pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
two_cat_cells (pr111 C) (f · g · h) (f · (g · h))

    
C: two_cat
W, X, Y, Z: pr111 (pr111 C)
f: pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ W, X ⟧
g: pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ X, Y ⟧
h: pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
two_cat_cells (pr111 C) (f · g · h) (f · (g · h))

    
C: two_cat
W, X, Y, Z: pr111 (pr111 C)
f: pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ W, X ⟧
g: pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ X, Y ⟧
h: pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
f · g · h = f · (g · h)

    refine (!assoc (f : pr1 C ⟦ _ , _ ⟧) g h).
Defined.


C: two_cat
prebicat_laws (two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)


C: two_cat
prebicat_laws (two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)

  
C: two_cat
∏ (a b : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), id₂ f • x = x
C: two_cat
∏ (a b : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), x • id₂ g = x
C: two_cat
∏ (a b : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f g h k : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h) (z : h ==> k),
x • (y • z) = (x • y) • z
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
f ◃ id₂ g = id₂ (f · g)
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
id₂ f ▹ g = id₂ (f · g)
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g h i : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : g ==> h) (y : h ==> i),
(f ◃ x) • (f ◃ y) = f ◃ (x • y)
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f g h : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(i : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h),
(x ▹ i) • (y ▹ i) = (x • y) ▹ i
C: two_cat
∏ (a b : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), (id₁ a ◃ x) • lunitor g = lunitor f • x
C: two_cat
∏ (a b : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), (x ▹ id₁ b) • runitor g = runitor f • x
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c d : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h i : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(x : h ==> i),
(f ◃ (g ◃ x)) • lassociator f g i =
lassociator f g h • (f · g ◃ x)
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c d : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g h : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(x : g ==> h),
(f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i =
lassociator f g i • ((f ◃ x) ▹ i)
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c d : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(h : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(x : f ==> g),
lassociator f h i • ((x ▹ h) ▹ i) =
(x ▹ h · i) • lassociator g h i
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(h i : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : f ==> g) (y : h ==> i),
(x ▹ h) • (g ◃ y) = (f ◃ y) • (x ▹ i)
C: two_cat
∏ (a b : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
lunitor f • linvunitor f = id₂ (id₁ a · f)
C: two_cat
∏ (a b : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
linvunitor f • lunitor f = id₂ f
C: two_cat
∏ (a b : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
runitor f • rinvunitor f = id₂ (f · id₁ b)
C: two_cat
∏ (a b : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
rinvunitor f • runitor f = id₂ f
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c d : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧),
lassociator f g h • rassociator f g h =
id₂ (f · (g · h))
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c d : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧),
rassociator f g h • lassociator f g h =
id₂ (f · g · h)
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
lassociator f (id₁ b) g • (runitor f ▹ g) =
f ◃ lunitor g
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c d e : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(i : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧),
((f ◃ lassociator g h i) • lassociator f (g · h) i)
• (lassociator f g h ▹ i) =
lassociator f g (h · i) • lassociator (f · g) h i

  
C: two_cat
∏ (a b : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), id₂ f • x = x
 
C: two_cat
a, b: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f, g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
id₂ f • x = x

    apply TwoCategories.id2_left.
  
C: two_cat
∏ (a b : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), x • id₂ g = x
 
C: two_cat
a, b: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f, g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
x • id₂ g = x

    apply TwoCategories.id2_right.
  
C: two_cat
∏ (a b : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f g h k : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h) (z : h ==> k),
x • (y • z) = (x • y) • z
 
C: two_cat
a, b: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f, g, h, k: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
z: h ==> k
x • (y • z) = (x • y) • z

    apply TwoCategories.vassocr.
  
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
f ◃ id₂ g = id₂ (f · g)

a, b, c: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f ◃ id₂ g = id₂ (f · g)

    apply TwoCategories.lwhisker_id2.
  
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧),

a, b, c: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
id₂ f ▹ g = id₂ (f · g)

    apply TwoCategories.id2_rwhisker.
  
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g h i : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : g ==> h) (y : h ==> i),
(f ◃ x) • (f ◃ y) = f ◃ (x • y)
 
C: two_cat
a, b, c: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g ==> h
y: h ==> i
(f ◃ x) • (f ◃ y) = f ◃ (x • y)

    apply TwoCategories.lwhisker_vcomp.
  
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f g h : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(i : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h),
(x ▹ i) • (y ▹ i) = (x • y) ▹ i
 
C: two_cat
a, b, c: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f, g, h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f ==> g
y: g ==> h
(x ▹ i) • (y ▹ i) = (x • y) ▹ i

    apply TwoCategories.rwhisker_vcomp.
  
C: two_cat
∏ (a b : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), (id₁ a ◃ x) • lunitor g = lunitor f • x
 
C: two_cat
a, b: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f, g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
(id₁ a ◃ x) • lunitor g = lunitor f • x

    apply TwoCategories.vcomp_lunitor.
  
C: two_cat
∏ (a b : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), (x ▹ id₁ b) • runitor g = runitor f • x
 
C: two_cat
a, b: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f, g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
(x ▹ id₁ b) • runitor g = runitor f • x

    apply TwoCategories.vcomp_runitor.
  
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c d : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h i : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(x : h ==> i),
(f ◃ (g ◃ x)) • lassociator f g i =
lassociator f g h • (f · g ◃ x)
 
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> i
(f ◃ (g ◃ x)) • lassociator f g i =
lassociator f g h • (f · g ◃ x)

    apply TwoCategories.lwhisker_lwhisker.
  
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c d : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g h : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(x : g ==> h),
(f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i =
lassociator f g i • ((f ◃ x) ▹ i)
 
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
(f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i =
lassociator f g i • ((f ◃ x) ▹ i)

    apply TwoCategories.rwhisker_lwhisker.
  
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c d : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(h : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(x : f ==> g),
lassociator f h i • ((x ▹ h) ▹ i) =
(x ▹ h · i) • lassociator g h i
 
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f, g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: f ==> g
lassociator f h i • ((x ▹ h) ▹ i) =
(x ▹ h · i) • lassociator g h i

    apply TwoCategories.rwhisker_rwhisker.
  
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(h i : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(x : f ==> g) (y : h ==> i),
(x ▹ h) • (g ◃ y) = (f ◃ y) • (x ▹ i)

y: h ==> i

f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (! assoc f g h))
  (idto2mor (assoc f g h)) = ?b

      apply idto2mor_comp.
    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
idto2mor (! assoc f g h @ assoc f g h) =
TwoCategories.id2 (f · g · h)

    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
idto2mor (idpath (f · g · h)) =
TwoCategories.id2 (f · g · h)

    apply idpath.
  
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
lassociator f (id₁ b) g • (runitor f ▹ g) =
f ◃ lunitor g
 
C: two_cat
a, b, c: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f (id₁ b) g))
  (TwoCategories.rwhisker g (idto2mor (id_right f))) =
TwoCategories.lwhisker f (idto2mor (id_left g))

a, b, c: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧

TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f (id₁ b) g))
  (TwoCategories.rwhisker g (idto2mor (id_right f))) =
?b

f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
?b = TwoCategories.lwhisker f (idto2mor (id_left g))

a, b, c: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C

TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f (id₁ b) g))
  (TwoCategories.rwhisker g (idto2mor (id_right f))) =
?b

      
C: two_cat
a, b, c: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
TwoCategories.rwhisker g (idto2mor (id_right f)) = ?t2

      apply idto2mor_rwhisker.
    
C: two_cat
a, b, c: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f (id₁ b) g))
  (idto2mor
     (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, b ⟧, q · g)
        (id_right f))) =
TwoCategories.lwhisker f (idto2mor (id_left g))

  (idto2mor
     (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, b ⟧, q · g)
        (id_right f))) = ?b

?b = TwoCategories.lwhisker f (idto2mor (id_left g))

  (idto2mor
     (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, b ⟧, q · g)
        (id_right f))) = ?b

f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
idto2mor
  (assoc f (id₁ b) g @
   maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, b ⟧, q · g)
     (id_right f)) =
TwoCategories.lwhisker f (idto2mor (id_left g))

f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
TwoCategories.lwhisker f (idto2mor (id_left g)) =
idto2mor
  (assoc f (id₁ b) g @
   maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, b ⟧, q · g)
     (id_right f))

f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
TwoCategories.lwhisker f (idto2mor (id_left g)) = ?b

a, b, c: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C

?b =
idto2mor
  (assoc f (id₁ b) g @
   maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, b ⟧, q · g)
     (id_right f))

    
C: two_cat
a, b, c: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
TwoCategories.lwhisker f (idto2mor (id_left g)) = ?b

      apply idto2mor_lwhisker.
    
C: two_cat
a, b, c: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
idto2mor
  (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ b, c ⟧, f · q)
     (id_left g)) =
idto2mor
  (assoc f (id₁ b) g @
   maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, b ⟧, q · g)
     (id_right f))

    
C: two_cat
a, b, c: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
idto2mor
  (assoc f (id₁ b) g @
   maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, b ⟧, q · g)
     (id_right f)) =
idto2mor
  (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ b, c ⟧, f · q)
     (id_left g))

    
C: two_cat
a, b, c: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
assoc f (id₁ b) g @
maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, b ⟧, q · g) (id_right f) =
maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ b, c ⟧, f · q) (id_left g)

    apply (homset_property C).
  
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c d e : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C)
(f : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(i : two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧),
((f ◃ lassociator g h i) • lassociator f (g · h) i)
• (lassociator f g h ▹ i) =
lassociator f g (h · i) • lassociator (f · g) h i
 
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.vcomp2
     (TwoCategories.lwhisker f
        (idto2mor (assoc g h i)))
     (idto2mor (assoc f (g · h) i)))
  (TwoCategories.rwhisker i (idto2mor (assoc f g h))) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f g (h · i)))
  (idto2mor (assoc (f · g) h i))

    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.vcomp2
     (TwoCategories.lwhisker f
        (idto2mor (assoc g h i)))
     (idto2mor (assoc f (g · h) i)))
  (TwoCategories.rwhisker i (idto2mor (assoc f g h))) =
?b
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
?b =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f g (h · i)))
  (idto2mor (assoc (f · g) h i))

    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.vcomp2
     (TwoCategories.lwhisker f
        (idto2mor (assoc g h i)))
     (idto2mor (assoc f (g · h) i)))
  (TwoCategories.rwhisker i (idto2mor (assoc f g h))) =
?b

      
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
TwoCategories.rwhisker i (idto2mor (assoc f g h)) =
?t2

      apply idto2mor_rwhisker.
    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.vcomp2
     (TwoCategories.lwhisker f
        (idto2mor (assoc g h i)))
     (idto2mor (assoc f (g · h) i)))
  (idto2mor
     (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, d ⟧, q · i)
        (assoc f g h))) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f g (h · i)))
  (idto2mor (assoc (f · g) h i))

    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧

TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.vcomp2
     (TwoCategories.lwhisker f
        (idto2mor (assoc g h i)))
     (idto2mor (assoc f (g · h) i)))
  (idto2mor
     (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, d ⟧, q · i)
        (assoc f g h))) = ?b
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
?b =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f g (h · i)))
  (idto2mor (assoc (f · g) h i))

    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧

h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.vcomp2
     (TwoCategories.lwhisker f
        (idto2mor (assoc g h i)))
     (idto2mor (assoc f (g · h) i)))
  (idto2mor
     (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, d ⟧, q · i)
        (assoc f g h))) = ?b

      
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
TwoCategories.lwhisker f (idto2mor (assoc g h i)) =
?y'

      apply idto2mor_lwhisker.
    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.vcomp2
     (idto2mor
        (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ b, e ⟧, f · q)
           (assoc g h i)))
     (idto2mor (assoc f (g · h) i)))
  (idto2mor
     (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, d ⟧, q · i)
        (assoc f g h))) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f g (h · i)))
  (idto2mor (assoc (f · g) h i))

    
C: two_cat

i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.vcomp2
     (idto2mor
        (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ b, e ⟧, f · q)
           (assoc g h i)))
     (idto2mor (assoc f (g · h) i)))
  (idto2mor
     (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, d ⟧, q · i)
        (assoc f g h))) = ?b
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
?b =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f g (h · i)))
  (idto2mor (assoc (f · g) h i))

    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (TwoCategories.vcomp2
     (idto2mor
        (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ b, e ⟧, f · q)
           (assoc g h i)))
     (idto2mor (assoc f (g · h) i)))
  (idto2mor
     (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, d ⟧, q · i)
        (assoc f g h))) = ?b

      
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (idto2mor
     (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ b, e ⟧, f · q)
        (assoc g h i))) (idto2mor (assoc f (g · h) i)) =
?y'

      apply idto2mor_comp.
    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (idto2mor
     (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ b, e ⟧, f · q)
        (assoc g h i) @ assoc f (g · h) i))
  (idto2mor
     (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, d ⟧, q · i)
        (assoc f g h))) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f g (h · i)))
  (idto2mor (assoc (f · g) h i))

    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (idto2mor
     (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ b, e ⟧, f · q)
        (assoc g h i) @ assoc f (g · h) i))
  (idto2mor
     (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, d ⟧, q · i)
        (assoc f g h))) = ?b
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
?b =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f g (h · i)))
  (idto2mor (assoc (f · g) h i))

    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
TwoCategories.vcomp2
  (idto2mor
     (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ b, e ⟧, f · q)
        (assoc g h i) @ assoc f (g · h) i))
  (idto2mor
     (maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, d ⟧, q · i)
        (assoc f g h))) = ?b

      apply idto2mor_comp.
    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
idto2mor
  ((maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ b, e ⟧, f · q)
      (assoc g h i) @ assoc f (g · h) i) @
   maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, d ⟧, q · i)
     (assoc f g h)) =
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f g (h · i)))
  (idto2mor (assoc (f · g) h i))

    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f g (h · i)))
  (idto2mor (assoc (f · g) h i)) =
idto2mor
  ((maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ b, e ⟧, f · q)
      (assoc g h i) @ assoc f (g · h) i) @
   maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, d ⟧, q · i)
     (assoc f g h))

    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f g (h · i)))
  (idto2mor (assoc (f · g) h i)) = ?b
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
?b =
idto2mor
  ((maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ b, e ⟧, f · q)
      (assoc g h i) @ assoc f (g · h) i) @
   maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, d ⟧, q · i)
     (assoc f g h))

    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
TwoCategories.vcomp2 (idto2mor (assoc f g (h · i)))
  (idto2mor (assoc (f · g) h i)) = ?b

      apply idto2mor_comp.
    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
idto2mor (assoc f g (h · i) @ assoc (f · g) h i) =
idto2mor
  ((maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ b, e ⟧, f · q)
      (assoc g h i) @ assoc f (g · h) i) @
   maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, d ⟧, q · i)
     (assoc f g h))

    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
idto2mor
  ((maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ b, e ⟧, f · q)
      (assoc g h i) @ assoc f (g · h) i) @
   maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, d ⟧, q · i)
     (assoc f g h)) =
idto2mor (assoc f g (h · i) @ assoc (f · g) h i)

    
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d, e: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C
f: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: two_cat_to_prebicat_data C ⟦ d, e ⟧
(maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ b, e ⟧, f · q)
   (assoc g h i) @ assoc f (g · h) i) @
maponpaths (λ q : pr1 C ⟦ a, d ⟧, q · i) (assoc f g h) =
assoc f g (h · i) @ assoc (f · g) h i

    apply (homset_property C).
Qed.

pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)) = idto2mor (idpath f)

Qed.

?w ~ idtoiso_2_1 f g

HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: two_cat_to_bicat C
f, g: two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ x, y ⟧
f = g ≃ invertible_2cell f g
 exact (make_weq _ (HC x y f g))%weq.

HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: two_cat_to_bicat C
f, g: two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ x, y ⟧
make_weq (λ p : f = g, idtoiso p) (HC x y f g) ~
idtoiso_2_1 f g

HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: two_cat_to_bicat C

p: f = g
make_weq (λ p : f = g, idtoiso p) (HC x y f g) p =
idtoiso_2_1 f g p

x, y: two_cat_to_bicat C

p: f = g
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: two_cat_to_bicat C
f, g: two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
pr1 (make_weq (λ p : f = g, idtoiso p) (HC x y f g) p) =
pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 f g p)

    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: two_cat_to_bicat C
f, g: two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell

x, y: two_cat_to_bicat C
f, g: two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
x0: f ==> g
isaprop (is_invertible_2cell x0)

      apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell.
    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: two_cat_to_bicat C
f, g: two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
pr1 (make_weq (λ p : f = g, idtoiso p) (HC x y f g) p) =
pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 f g p)

    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: two_cat_to_bicat C
f: two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ x, y ⟧
TwoCategories.id2 f = TwoCategories.id2 f

    apply idpath.
Qed.

 strictness_structure_laws S) ?pr1

strictness_structure_data (two_cat_to_bicat C)
 
C: two_cat
∏ (a b : two_cat_to_bicat C)
(f : two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ a, b ⟧), id₁ a · f = f
C: two_cat
∏ (a b : two_cat_to_bicat C)
(f : two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · id₁ b = f
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c d : two_cat_to_bicat C)
(f : two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ c, d ⟧),
f · (g · h) = f · g · h

      
C: two_cat
∏ (a b : two_cat_to_bicat C)
(f : two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ a, b ⟧), id₁ a · f = f
 
C: two_cat
a, b: two_cat_to_bicat C
f: two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ a, b ⟧
id₁ a · f = f

        exact (id_left (f : pr1 C ⟦ _ , _ ⟧)).
      
C: two_cat
∏ (a b : two_cat_to_bicat C)
(f : two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · id₁ b = f
 
C: two_cat
a, b: two_cat_to_bicat C
f: two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f · id₁ b = f

        exact (id_right (f : pr1 C ⟦ _ , _ ⟧)).
      
C: two_cat
∏ (a b c d : two_cat_to_bicat C)
(f : two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ c, d ⟧),
f · (g · h) = f · g · h
 
C: two_cat
a, b, c, d: two_cat_to_bicat C
f: two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ c, d ⟧
f · (g · h) = f · g · h

        exact (assoc (f : pr1 C ⟦ _ , _ ⟧) g h).
    
C: two_cat
(λ S : strictness_structure_data (two_cat_to_bicat C),
 strictness_structure_laws S)
  ((λ (a b : two_cat_to_bicat C)
    (f : two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
    id_left (f : pr1 C ⟦ a, b ⟧)),,
   (λ (a b : two_cat_to_bicat C)
    (f : two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
    id_right (f : pr1 C ⟦ a, b ⟧)),,
   (λ (a b c d : two_cat_to_bicat C)
    (f : two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
    (g : two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
    (h : two_cat_to_bicat C ⟦ c, d ⟧),
    assoc (f : pr1 C ⟦ a, b ⟧) g h))
 
C: two_cat
strictness_structure_laws
  ((λ (a b : pr111 (pr111 C))
    (f : pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ a, b ⟧), id_left f),,
   (λ (a b : pr111 (pr111 C))
    (f : pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ a, b ⟧), id_right f),,
   (λ (a b c d : pr111 (pr111 C))
    (f : pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
    (g : pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ b, c ⟧)
    (h : pr111 (pr11 C) ⟦ c, d ⟧), assoc f g h))

      repeat split ; intros ; apply idto2mor_idtoiso_two_cat.
Qed.
(* it is remarkable that this can be opaque although [strictness_structure_data]
   is being constructed under the first + item *)

        (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) = pr11 C

C: strict_bicat
two_cat_to_prebicat_data (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) =
pr111 C
 
C: strict_bicat
(((let X := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
   let X0 := pr1 X in
   let X1 := pr1 X0 in
   let X2 := pr1 X1 in
   let X3 := pr1 X2 in let X4 := pr1 X3 in X4),,
  ((λ x y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)),
    pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   :
   (let X := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
    let X0 := pr1 X in
    let X1 := pr1 X0 in
    let X2 := pr1 X1 in
    let X3 := pr1 X2 in let X4 := pr1 X3 in X4)
   → (let X := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
      let X0 := pr1 X in
      let X1 := pr1 X0 in
      let X2 := pr1 X1 in
      let X3 := pr1 X2 in let X4 := pr1 X3 in X4) → UU)),,
 ((λ X : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)),
   id₁ X)
  :
  ∏
  X : let X := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
      let X0 := pr1 X in
      let X1 := pr1 X0 in
      let X2 := pr1 X1 in
      let X3 := pr1 X2 in let X4 := pr1 X3 in X4,
  ((λ x y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)),
    pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   :
   (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
    let X1 := pr1 X0 in
    let X2 := pr1 X1 in
    let X3 := pr1 X2 in
    let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
   → (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
      let X1 := pr1 X0 in
      let X2 := pr1 X1 in
      let X3 := pr1 X2 in
      let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5) → UU)
    X X),,
 ((λ (X Y
      Z : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)))
   (f : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ X,
        Y ⟧)
   (g : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ Y,
        Z ⟧), f · g)
  :
  ∏
  (X : let X := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
       let X0 := pr1 X in
       let X1 := pr1 X0 in
       let X2 := pr1 X1 in
       let X3 := pr1 X2 in let X4 := pr1 X3 in X4)
  (Y
   Z : let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
       let X1 := pr1 X0 in
       let X2 := pr1 X1 in
       let X3 := pr1 X2 in
       let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5),
  ((λ x y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)),
    pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   :
   (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
    let X1 := pr1 X0 in
    let X2 := pr1 X1 in
    let X3 := pr1 X2 in
    let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
   → (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
      let X1 := pr1 X0 in
      let X2 := pr1 X1 in
      let X3 := pr1 X2 in
      let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5) → UU)
    X Y
  → ((λ x
         y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)),
      pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ x, y
      ⟧)
     :
     (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
      let X1 := pr1 X0 in
      let X2 := pr1 X1 in
      let X3 := pr1 X2 in
      let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
     → (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
        let X1 := pr1 X0 in
        let X2 := pr1 X1 in
        let X3 := pr1 X2 in
        let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
       → UU) Y Z
    → ((λ x
           y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)),
        pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ x,
        y ⟧)
       :
       (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
        let X1 := pr1 X0 in
        let X2 := pr1 X1 in
        let X3 := pr1 X2 in
        let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
       → (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
          let X1 := pr1 X0 in
          let X2 := pr1 X1 in
          let X3 := pr1 X2 in
          let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
         → UU) X Z)),,
((λ (X Y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)))
  (f
   g : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ X, Y
       ⟧),
  two_cat_cells (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) f
    g)
 :
 ∏
 (X : let X := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
      let X0 := pr1 X in
      let X1 := pr1 X0 in
      let X2 := pr1 X1 in
      let X3 := pr1 X2 in let X4 := pr1 X3 in X4)
 (Y : let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
      let X1 := pr1 X0 in
      let X2 := pr1 X1 in
      let X3 := pr1 X2 in
      let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5),
 ((λ x y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)),
   pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ x, y ⟧)
  :
  (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
   let X1 := pr1 X0 in
   let X2 := pr1 X1 in
   let X3 := pr1 X2 in
   let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
  → (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
     let X1 := pr1 X0 in
     let X2 := pr1 X1 in
     let X3 := pr1 X2 in
     let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5) → UU)
   X Y
 → ((λ x y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)),
     pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ x, y ⟧)
    :
    (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in

            f g)
         (((λ (X0 Y0 Z0 : pr111 (pr111 ...))
            (f0 : pr111 ... ⟦ X0, Y0 ⟧)
            (g0 : pr111 ... ⟦ Y0, Z0 ⟧), f0 · g0)
           :
           ∏ (X0 : let X0 := ... in ... ...)
           (Y0 Z0 : let X1 := ... in ... ...),
           (...) X0 Y0 → ... Y0 Z0 → ... X0 Z0) X Y Z
            f h))
    :
    ∏
    (a b
     c : (((let X := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)
              in
            let X0 := pr1 X in
            let X1 := pr1 X0 in
            let X2 := ... in ... ...),,
           ((λ x y : pr111 (pr111 ...),
             pr111 (pr11 ...) ⟦ x, y ⟧)
            :
            (let X := ... in ... ...) → (... ...) → UU)),,
          ((λ X : pr111 (pr111 (...)), id₁ X)
           :
           ∏
           X : let X := pr1 ... in
               let X0 := ... in ... ...,
           ((...) : ... → ...) X X),,
          ((λ (X Y Z : pr111 (pr111 (...)))
            (f : pr111 (pr11 ...) ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
            (g : pr111 (pr11 ...) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧), f · g)
           :
           ∏
           (X : let X := pr1 ... in
                let X0 := ... in ... ...)
           (Y
            Z : let X0 := pr1 ... in
                let X1 := ... in ... ...),
           (... : ...) X Y → (...) Y Z → (...) X Z)),,
         ((λ (X
              Y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                  C)))
           (f
            g : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C))
                ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
           two_cat_cells
             (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) f g)
          :
          ∏
          (X : let X :=
                 pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
               let X0 := pr1 X in
               let X1 := pr1 X0 in
               let X2 := pr1 X1 in
               let X3 := ... in ... X4)
          (Y : let X0 :=
                 pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
               let X1 := pr1 X0 in
               let X2 := pr1 X1 in
               let X3 := pr1 X2 in
               let X4 := ... in ... X5),
          ((λ x y : pr111 ..., pr111 ... ⟦ x, y ⟧)
           :
           (... ...) → (...) → UU) X Y
          → ((λ ..., ...) : (...) → ... → UU) X Y → UU))
    (f : ((((let X := pr1 ... in
             let X0 := ... in ... ...),,
            ((λ ..., ...) : (...) → ... → UU)),,
           ((λ X : pr111 ..., id₁ X)
            :
            ∏ X : ... ..., (...) X X),,
           ((λ (X Y Z : pr111 ...) (f : ...)
             (g : ...), f · g)
            :
            ∏ (X : ... ...) (Y Z : ... ...),
            ... X Y → ... → ...)),,
          ((λ (X
               Y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                   C)))
            (f g : pr111 (pr11 (...)) ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
            two_cat_cells
              (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) f g)
           :
           ∏
           (X : let X := pr1 (...) in
                let X0 := pr1 X in
                let X1 := ... in ... ...)
           (Y : let X0 := pr1 (...) in
                let X1 := pr1 X0 in
                let X2 := ... in ... ...),
           ((...) : ... → ...) X Y
           → (... : ...) X Y → UU)) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
    (g1
     g2 : ((((let X := pr1 ... in
              let X0 := ... in ... ...),,
             ((λ ..., ...) : (...) → ... → UU)),,
            ((λ X : pr111 ..., id₁ X)
             :
             ∏ X : ... ..., (...) X X),,
            ((λ (X Y Z : pr111 ...) (f0 : ...)
              (g : ...), f0 · g)
             :
             ∏ (X : ... ...) (Y Z : ... ...),
             ... X Y → ... → ...)),,
           ((λ (X
                Y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                    C)))
             (f0 g : pr111 (pr11 (...)) ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
             two_cat_cells
               (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) f0
               g)
            :
            ∏
            (X : let X := pr1 (...) in
                 let X0 := pr1 X in
                 let X1 := ... in ... ...)
            (Y : let X0 := pr1 (...) in
                 let X1 := pr1 X0 in
                 let X2 := ... in ... ...),
            ((...) : ... → ...) X Y
            → (... : ...) X Y → UU)) ⟦ b, c ⟧),
    g1 ==> g2 → f · g1 ==> f · g2),,
   (((λ (X Y
         Z : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)))
      (g
       h : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C))
           ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
      (f : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C))
           ⟦ Y, Z ⟧)
      (α : two_cat_cells
             (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) g h),
      TwoCategories.rwhisker f α)
     :
     ∏
     (X : let X := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
          let X0 := pr1 X in
          let X1 := pr1 X0 in
          let X2 := pr1 X1 in
          let X3 := pr1 X2 in let X4 := pr1 X3 in X4)
     (Y
      Z : let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
          let X1 := pr1 X0 in
          let X2 := pr1 X1 in
          let X3 := pr1 X2 in
          let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
     (g
      h : ((λ x
               y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                   C)),
            pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C))
            ⟦ x, y ⟧)
           :
           (let X0 := pr1 (...) in
            let X1 := pr1 X0 in
            let X2 := ... in ... ...)
           → (let X0 := pr1 ... in
              let X1 := ... in ... ...) → UU) X Y)
     (f : ((λ x
               y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                   C)),
            pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C))
            ⟦ x, y ⟧)
           :
           (let X0 := pr1 (...) in
            let X1 := pr1 X0 in
            let X2 := ... in ... ...)
           → (let X0 := pr1 ... in
              let X1 := ... in ... ...) → UU) Y Z),
     ((λ (X0
          Y0 : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)))
       (f0 g0 : pr111 (pr11 (...)) ⟦ X0, Y0 ⟧),
       two_cat_cells
         (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) f0 g0)
      :
      ∏
      (X0 : let X0 := pr1 (...) in
            let X1 := pr1 X0 in
            let X2 := ... in ... ...)
      (Y0 : let X1 := pr1 (...) in
            let X2 := pr1 X1 in
            let X3 := ... in ... ...),
      ((...) : ... → ...) X0 Y0
      → (... : ...) X0 Y0 → UU) X Y g h
     → ((λ (X0
            Y0 : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                 C)))
         (f0 g0 : pr111 (pr11 (...)) ⟦ X0, Y0 ⟧),
         two_cat_cells
           (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) f0 g0)
        :

              let X1 := pr1 X0 in
              let X2 := ... in ... ...)
        (Y0 : let X1 := pr1 (...) in
              let X2 := pr1 X1 in
              let X3 := ... in ... ...),
        ((...) : ... → ...) X0 Y0
        → (... : ...) X0 Y0 → UU) X Z
         (((λ (X0 Y0 Z0 : pr111 (pr111 ...))
            (f0 : pr111 ... ⟦ X0, Y0 ⟧)
            (g0 : pr111 ... ⟦ Y0, Z0 ⟧), f0 · g0)
           :
           ∏ (X0 : let X0 := ... in ... ...)
           (Y0 Z0 : let X1 := ... in ... ...),
           (...) X0 Y0 → ... Y0 Z0 → ... X0 Z0) X Y Z
            g f)
         (((λ (X0 Y0 Z0 : pr111 (pr111 ...))
            (f0 : pr111 ... ⟦ X0, Y0 ⟧)
            (g0 : pr111 ... ⟦ Y0, Z0 ⟧), f0 · g0)
           :
           ∏ (X0 : let X0 := ... in ... ...)
           (Y0 Z0 : let X1 := ... in ... ...),
           (...) X0 Y0 → ... Y0 Z0 → ... X0 Z0) X Y Z
            h f))
    :
    (λ _ : ∏
           (a b
            c : (((... ...),, (... : ...)),,
                 ((...) : ∏ ..., ...),,
                 ((...) : ∏ ... ..., ...)),,
                ((λ (X Y : pr111 (pr111 ...))
                  (f g : pr111 ... ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                  two_cat_cells (pr111 ...) f g)
                 :
                 ∏ (X : let X := ... in ... ...)
                 (Y : let X0 := ... in ... ...),
                 (...) X Y → ... X Y → UU))
           (f : (((...,, ...),, (...),, (...)),,
                 ((λ ... ..., ...)
                  :
                  ∏ (X : ...) (Y : ...), ... → ...))
                ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (g1
            g2 : (((...,, ...),, (...),, (...)),,
                  ((λ ... ..., ...)
                   :
                   ∏ (X : ...) (Y : ...), ... → ...))
                 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
           g1 ==> g2 → f · g1 ==> f · g2,
     ∏
     (a b
      c : (((let X := ... in ... ...),,
            ((...) : ... → ...)),,
           ((λ ..., ...) : ∏ X : ..., ... X X),,
           ((λ ... ... ..., ...)
            :
            ∏ (X : ...) (Y Z : ...), ... → ...)),,
          ((λ (X Y : pr111 (pr111 (...)))
            (f g : pr111 (pr11 ...) ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
            two_cat_cells (pr111 (...)) f g)
           :
           ∏
           (X : let X := pr1 ... in
                let X0 := ... in ... ...)
           (Y : let X0 := pr1 ... in
                let X1 := ... in ... ...),
           (... : ...) X Y → (...) X Y → UU))
     (f1
      f2 : ((((...),, (...)),,
             (... : ...),, (... : ...)),,
            ((λ (X Y : pr111 ...) (f g : ...),
              two_cat_cells ... f g)
             :
             ∏ (X : ... ...) (Y : ... ...),
             ... X Y → ... → UU)) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (g : ((((...),, (...)),,
            (... : ...),, (... : ...)),,
           ((λ (X Y : pr111 ...) (f g : ...),
             two_cat_cells ... f g)
            :
            ∏ (X : ... ...) (Y : ... ...),
            ... X Y → ... → UU)) ⟦ b, c ⟧),
     f1 ==> f2 → f1 · g ==> f2 · g)
      (((λ (X Y
            Z : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                C)))
         (f : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C))
              ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
         (g
          h : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C))
              ⟦ Y, Z ⟧)
         (α : two_cat_cells
                (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) g
                h), TwoCategories.lwhisker f α)
        :
        ∏
        (X : let X := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)
               in
             let X0 := pr1 X in
             let X1 := pr1 X0 in
             let X2 := pr1 X1 in
             let X3 := ... in ... X4)
        (Y
         Z : let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)
               in
             let X1 := pr1 X0 in
             let X2 := pr1 X1 in
             let X3 := pr1 X2 in
             let X4 := ... in ... X5)
        (f : ((λ x y : pr111 ..., pr111 ... ⟦ x, y ⟧)
              :
              (... ...) → (...) → UU) X Y)
        (g
         h : ((λ x y : pr111 ..., pr111 ... ⟦ x, y ⟧)
              :
              (... ...) → (...) → UU) Y Z),
        ((λ (X0 Y0 : pr111 ...) (f0 g0 : ...),
          two_cat_cells ... f0 g0)
         :
         ∏ (X0 : ... ...) (Y0 : ... ...),
         ... X0 Y0 → ... → UU) Y Z g h
        → ((λ (X0 Y0 : pr111 ...) (f0 g0 : ...),
            two_cat_cells ... f0 g0)
           :
           ∏ (X0 : ... ...) (Y0 : ... ...),
           ... X0 Y0 → ... → UU) X Z
            (((...) : ∏ ... ..., ...) X Y Z f g)
            (((...) : ∏ ... ..., ...) X Y Z f h))
       :
       ∏
       (a b
        c : (((let X := ... in ... ...),,
              ((...) : ... → ...)),,
             ((λ ..., ...) : ∏ X : ..., ... X X),,
             ((λ ... ... ..., ...)
              :
              ∏ (X : ...) (Y Z : ...), ... → ...)),,
            ((λ (X Y : pr111 (pr111 (...)))
              (f g : pr111 (pr11 ...) ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
              two_cat_cells (pr111 (...)) f g)
             :
             ∏
             (X : let X := pr1 ... in
                  let X0 := ... in ... ...)
             (Y : let X0 := pr1 ... in
                  let X1 := ... in ... ...),
             (... : ...) X Y → (...) X Y → UU))
       (f : ((((...),, (...)),,
              (... : ...),, (... : ...)),,
             ((λ (X Y : pr111 ...) (f g : ...),
               two_cat_cells ... f g)
              :
              ∏ (X : ... ...) (Y : ... ...),
              ... X Y → ... → UU)) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g1
        g2 : ((((...),, (...)),,
               (... : ...),, (... : ...)),,
              ((λ (X Y : pr111 ...) (f0 g : ...),
                two_cat_cells ... f0 g)
               :
               ∏ (X : ... ...) (Y : ... ...),
               ... X Y → ... → UU)) ⟦ b, c ⟧),
       g1 ==> g2 → f · g1 ==> f · g2))) =
pr211 (pr1 C)

    
C: strict_bicat
(((let X := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
   let X0 := pr1 X in
   let X1 := pr1 X0 in
   let X2 := pr1 X1 in
   let X3 := pr1 X2 in let X4 := pr1 X3 in X4),,
  ((λ x y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)),

   id₁ X)

      let X2 := pr1 X1 in

  ((λ x y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)),
    pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   :
   (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
    let X1 := pr1 X0 in
    let X2 := pr1 X1 in
    let X3 := pr1 X2 in
    let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
   → (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
      let X1 := pr1 X0 in
      let X2 := pr1 X1 in
      let X3 := pr1 X2 in
      let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5) → UU)
    X X),,
 ((λ (X Y
      Z : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)))
   (f : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ X,
        Y ⟧)
   (g : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ Y,
        Z ⟧), f · g)
  :

  (X : let X := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
       let X0 := pr1 X in
       let X1 := pr1 X0 in
       let X2 := pr1 X1 in
       let X3 := pr1 X2 in let X4 := pr1 X3 in X4)
  (Y
   Z : let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
       let X1 := pr1 X0 in
       let X2 := pr1 X1 in
       let X3 := pr1 X2 in
       let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5),
  ((λ x y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)),
    pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   :
   (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
    let X1 := pr1 X0 in
    let X2 := pr1 X1 in
    let X3 := pr1 X2 in
    let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
   → (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
      let X1 := pr1 X0 in
      let X2 := pr1 X1 in
      let X3 := pr1 X2 in
      let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5) → UU)
    X Y
  → ((λ x
         y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)),
      pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ x, y
      ⟧)
     :
     (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in

        let X2 := pr1 X1 in

    → ((λ x
           y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)),
        pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ x,

((λ (X Y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)))
  (f
   g : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ X, Y
       ⟧),
  two_cat_cells (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) f
    g)
 :
 ∏
 (X : let X := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
      let X0 := pr1 X in
      let X1 := pr1 X0 in
      let X2 := pr1 X1 in
      let X3 := pr1 X2 in let X4 := pr1 X3 in X4)
 (Y : let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
      let X1 := pr1 X0 in
      let X2 := pr1 X1 in
      let X3 := pr1 X2 in
      let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5),
 ((λ x y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)),
   pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ x, y ⟧)
  :
  (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
   let X1 := pr1 X0 in
   let X2 := pr1 X1 in
   let X3 := pr1 X2 in
   let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
  → (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
     let X1 := pr1 X0 in
     let X2 := pr1 X1 in
     let X3 := pr1 X2 in
     let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5) → UU)
   X Y
 → ((λ x y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)),
     pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ x, y ⟧)
    :
    (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
     let X1 := pr1 X0 in
     let X2 := pr1 X1 in
     let X3 := pr1 X2 in
     let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
    → (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
       let X1 := pr1 X0 in
       let X2 := pr1 X1 in
       let X3 := pr1 X2 in
       let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
      → UU) X Y → UU) = pr111 (pr1 C)
 apply idpath.
    
C: strict_bicat
transportf
  (λ C : prebicat_1_id_comp_cells,
   prebicat_2_id_comp_struct C)
  (idpath (pr111 (pr1 C)))
  (((λ (X
        Y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)))
     (f : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C))
          ⟦ X, Y ⟧), TwoCategories.id2 f)
    :
    ∏
    (X : let X := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in
         let X1 := pr1 X0 in
         let X2 := pr1 X1 in
         let X3 := pr1 X2 in let X4 := pr1 X3 in X4)
    (Y : let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
         let X1 := pr1 X0 in
         let X2 := pr1 X1 in
         let X3 := pr1 X2 in
         let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
    (f : ((λ x
              y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                  C)),
           pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C))
           ⟦ x, y ⟧)
          :
          (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)
             in
           let X1 := pr1 X0 in
           let X2 := pr1 X1 in
           let X3 := pr1 X2 in
           let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
          → (let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)
               in
             let X1 := pr1 X0 in
             let X2 := pr1 X1 in
             let X3 := pr1 X2 in
             let X4 := pr1 X3 in
             let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5) → UU) X Y),
    ((λ (X0
         Y0 : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)))
      (f0
       g : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C))
           ⟦ X0, Y0 ⟧),
      two_cat_cells
        (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) f0 g)
     :
     ∏
     (X0 : let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)
             in
           let X1 := pr1 X0 in
           let X2 := pr1 X1 in
           let X3 := pr1 X2 in
           let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
     (Y0 : let X1 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)
             in
           let X2 := pr1 X1 in
           let X3 := pr1 X2 in
           let X4 := pr1 X3 in
           let X5 := pr1 X4 in let X6 := pr1 X5 in X6),
     ((λ x
          y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)),
       pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) ⟦ x, y
       ⟧)

           (Y : let X0 := pr1 (...) in
                let X1 := pr1 X0 in
                let X2 := ... in ... ...),
           ((...) : ... → ...) X Y
           → (... : ...) X Y → UU)) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
    (g1
     g2 : ((((let X := pr1 ... in
              let X0 := ... in ... ...),,
             ((λ ..., ...) : (...) → ... → UU)),,
            ((λ X : pr111 ..., id₁ X)
             :
             ∏ X : ... ..., (...) X X),,
            ((λ (X Y Z : pr111 ...) (f0 : ...)
              (g : ...), f0 · g)
             :
             ∏ (X : ... ...) (Y Z : ... ...),
             ... X Y → ... → ...)),,
           ((λ (X
                Y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                    C)))
             (f0 g : pr111 (pr11 (...)) ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
             two_cat_cells
               (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) f0
               g)
            :
            ∏
            (X : let X := pr1 (...) in
                 let X0 := pr1 X in
                 let X1 := ... in ... ...)
            (Y : let X0 := pr1 (...) in
                 let X1 := pr1 X0 in
                 let X2 := ... in ... ...),
            ((...) : ... → ...) X Y
            → (... : ...) X Y → UU)) ⟦ b, c ⟧),
    g1 ==> g2 → f · g1 ==> f · g2),,
   (((λ (X Y
         Z : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)))
      (g
       h : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C))
           ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
      (f : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C))
           ⟦ Y, Z ⟧)
      (α : two_cat_cells
             (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) g h),
      TwoCategories.rwhisker f α)
     :
     ∏
     (X : let X := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
          let X0 := pr1 X in
          let X1 := pr1 X0 in
          let X2 := pr1 X1 in
          let X3 := pr1 X2 in let X4 := pr1 X3 in X4)
     (Y
      Z : let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
          let X1 := pr1 X0 in
          let X2 := pr1 X1 in
          let X3 := pr1 X2 in
          let X4 := pr1 X3 in let X5 := pr1 X4 in X5)
     (g
      h : ((λ x
               y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                   C)),
            pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C))
            ⟦ x, y ⟧)
           :
           (let X0 := pr1 (...) in
            let X1 := pr1 X0 in
            let X2 := ... in ... ...)
           → (let X0 := pr1 ... in
              let X1 := ... in ... ...) → UU) X Y)
     (f : ((λ x
               y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                   C)),
            pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C))
            ⟦ x, y ⟧)
           :
           (let X0 := pr1 (...) in
            let X1 := pr1 X0 in
            let X2 := ... in ... ...)
           → (let X0 := pr1 ... in
              let X1 := ... in ... ...) → UU) Y Z),
     ((λ (X0
          Y0 : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)))
       (f0 g0 : pr111 (pr11 (...)) ⟦ X0, Y0 ⟧),
       two_cat_cells
         (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) f0 g0)
      :
      ∏
      (X0 : let X0 := pr1 (...) in
            let X1 := pr1 X0 in
            let X2 := ... in ... ...)
      (Y0 : let X1 := pr1 (...) in
            let X2 := pr1 X1 in
            let X3 := ... in ... ...),
      ((...) : ... → ...) X0 Y0
      → (... : ...) X0 Y0 → UU) X Y g h
     → ((λ (X0
            Y0 : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                 C)))
         (f0 g0 : pr111 (pr11 (...)) ⟦ X0, Y0 ⟧),
         two_cat_cells
           (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) f0 g0)
        :
        ∏
        (X0 : let X0 := pr1 (...) in
              let X1 := pr1 X0 in
              let X2 := ... in ... ...)
        (Y0 : let X1 := pr1 (...) in
              let X2 := pr1 X1 in
              let X3 := ... in ... ...),
        ((...) : ... → ...) X0 Y0
        → (... : ...) X0 Y0 → UU) X Z
         (((λ (X0 Y0 Z0 : pr111 (pr111 ...))
            (f0 : pr111 ... ⟦ X0, Y0 ⟧)
            (g0 : pr111 ... ⟦ Y0, Z0 ⟧), f0 · g0)
           :
           ∏ (X0 : let X0 := ... in ... ...)
           (Y0 Z0 : let X1 := ... in ... ...),
           (...) X0 Y0 → ... Y0 Z0 → ... X0 Z0) X Y Z
            g f)
         (((λ (X0 Y0 Z0 : pr111 (pr111 ...))
            (f0 : pr111 ... ⟦ X0, Y0 ⟧)
            (g0 : pr111 ... ⟦ Y0, Z0 ⟧), f0 · g0)
           :
           ∏ (X0 : let X0 := ... in ... ...)
           (Y0 Z0 : let X1 := ... in ... ...),
           (...) X0 Y0 → ... Y0 Z0 → ... X0 Z0) X Y Z
            h f))
    :
    (λ _ : ∏
           (a b
            c : (((... ...),, (... : ...)),,
                 ((...) : ∏ ..., ...),,
                 ((...) : ∏ ... ..., ...)),,
                ((λ (X Y : pr111 (pr111 ...))
                  (f g : pr111 ... ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                  two_cat_cells (pr111 ...) f g)
                 :
                 ∏ (X : let X := ... in ... ...)
                 (Y : let X0 := ... in ... ...),
                 (...) X Y → ... X Y → UU))
           (f : (((...,, ...),, (...),, (...)),,
                 ((λ ... ..., ...)
                  :
                  ∏ (X : ...) (Y : ...), ... → ...))
                ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (g1
            g2 : (((...,, ...),, (...),, (...)),,
                  ((λ ... ..., ...)
                   :
                   ∏ (X : ...) (Y : ...), ... → ...))
                 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
           g1 ==> g2 → f · g1 ==> f · g2,
     ∏
     (a b
      c : (((let X := ... in ... ...),,
            ((...) : ... → ...)),,
           ((λ ..., ...) : ∏ X : ..., ... X X),,
           ((λ ... ... ..., ...)
            :
            ∏ (X : ...) (Y Z : ...), ... → ...)),,
          ((λ (X Y : pr111 (pr111 (...)))
            (f g : pr111 (pr11 ...) ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
            two_cat_cells (pr111 (...)) f g)
           :
           ∏
           (X : let X := pr1 ... in
                let X0 := ... in ... ...)
           (Y : let X0 := pr1 ... in
                let X1 := ... in ... ...),
           (... : ...) X Y → (...) X Y → UU))
     (f1
      f2 : ((((...),, (...)),,
             (... : ...),, (... : ...)),,
            ((λ (X Y : pr111 ...) (f g : ...),
              two_cat_cells ... f g)
             :
             ∏ (X : ... ...) (Y : ... ...),
             ... X Y → ... → UU)) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
     (g : ((((...),, (...)),,
            (... : ...),, (... : ...)),,
           ((λ (X Y : pr111 ...) (f g : ...),
             two_cat_cells ... f g)
            :
            ∏ (X : ... ...) (Y : ... ...),
            ... X Y → ... → UU)) ⟦ b, c ⟧),
     f1 ==> f2 → f1 · g ==> f2 · g)
      (((λ (X Y
            Z : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                C)))
         (f : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C))
              ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
         (g
          h : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C))
              ⟦ Y, Z ⟧)
         (α : two_cat_cells
                (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) g
                h), TwoCategories.lwhisker f α)
        :
        ∏
        (X : let X := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)
               in
             let X0 := pr1 X in
             let X1 := pr1 X0 in
             let X2 := pr1 X1 in
             let X3 := ... in ... X4)
        (Y
         Z : let X0 := pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)
               in
             let X1 := pr1 X0 in
             let X2 := pr1 X1 in
             let X3 := pr1 X2 in
             let X4 := ... in ... X5)
        (f : ((λ x y : pr111 ..., pr111 ... ⟦ x, y ⟧)
              :
              (... ...) → (...) → UU) X Y)
        (g
         h : ((λ x y : pr111 ..., pr111 ... ⟦ x, y ⟧)
              :
              (... ...) → (...) → UU) Y Z),
        ((λ (X0 Y0 : pr111 ...) (f0 g0 : ...),
          two_cat_cells ... f0 g0)
         :
         ∏ (X0 : ... ...) (Y0 : ... ...),
         ... X0 Y0 → ... → UU) Y Z g h
        → ((λ (X0 Y0 : pr111 ...) (f0 g0 : ...),
            two_cat_cells ... f0 g0)
           :
           ∏ (X0 : ... ...) (Y0 : ... ...),
           ... X0 Y0 → ... → UU) X Z
            (((...) : ∏ ... ..., ...) X Y Z f g)
            (((...) : ∏ ... ..., ...) X Y Z f h))
       :
       ∏
       (a b
        c : (((let X := ... in ... ...),,
              ((...) : ... → ...)),,
             ((λ ..., ...) : ∏ X : ..., ... X X),,
             ((λ ... ... ..., ...)
              :
              ∏ (X : ...) (Y Z : ...), ... → ...)),,
            ((λ (X Y : pr111 (pr111 (...)))
              (f g : pr111 (pr11 ...) ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
              two_cat_cells (pr111 (...)) f g)
             :
             ∏
             (X : let X := pr1 ... in
                  let X0 := ... in ... ...)
             (Y : let X0 := pr1 ... in
                  let X1 := ... in ... ...),
             (... : ...) X Y → (...) X Y → UU))
       (f : ((((...),, (...)),,
              (... : ...),, (... : ...)),,
             ((λ (X Y : pr111 ...) (f g : ...),
               two_cat_cells ... f g)
              :
              ∏ (X : ... ...) (Y : ... ...),
              ... X Y → ... → UU)) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (g1
        g2 : ((((...),, (...)),,
               (... : ...),, (... : ...)),,
              ((λ (X Y : pr111 ...) (f0 g : ...),
                two_cat_cells ... f0 g)
               :
               ∏ (X : ... ...) (Y : ... ...),
               ... X Y → ... → UU)) ⟦ b, c ⟧),
       g1 ==> g2 → f · g1 ==> f · g2))) =
pr211 (pr1 C)
 
C: strict_bicat
(λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧), id₂ f),,
(λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (plunitor (pr22 C) f)),,
(λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (prunitor (pr22 C) f)),,
(λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (! plunitor (pr22 C) f)),,
(λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (! prunitor (pr22 C) f)),,
(λ (W X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ W, X ⟧) (g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
 (h : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
 idto2mor (! plassociator (pr22 C) f g h)),,
(λ (W X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ W, X ⟧) (g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
 (h : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
 idto2mor (plassociator (pr22 C) f g h)),,
(λ (X Y : C) (f g h : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (α : f ==> g)
 (β : g ==> h), α • β),,
(λ (X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (g h : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧)
 (α : g ==> h), f ◃ α),,
(λ (X Y Z : C) (g h : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (f : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧)
 (α : g ==> h), α ▹ f) = pr211 (pr1 C)

      
C: strict_bicat
(λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (plunitor (pr22 C) f)) = pr122 (pr111 C)
C: strict_bicat
(λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (prunitor (pr22 C) f)) =
pr122 (pr211 (pr1 C))
C: strict_bicat
(λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (! plunitor (pr22 C) f)) =
pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))
C: strict_bicat
(λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (! prunitor (pr22 C) f)) =
pr122 (pr222 (pr111 C))
C: strict_bicat
(λ (W X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ W, X ⟧) (g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
 (h : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
 idto2mor (! plassociator (pr22 C) f g h)) =
pr122 (pr222 (pr211 (pr1 C)))
C: strict_bicat
(λ (W X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ W, X ⟧) (g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
 (h : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
 idto2mor (plassociator (pr22 C) f g h)) =
pr122 (pr222 (pr221 (pr11 C)))

      
C: strict_bicat
(λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (plunitor (pr22 C) f)) = pr122 (pr111 C)
 
C: strict_bicat
(λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (plunitor (pr22 C) f)) ~ pr122 (pr111 C)

        
C: strict_bicat
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
(λ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (plunitor (pr22 C) f)) = (pr122 (pr111 C)) x

        
C: strict_bicat
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
(λ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (plunitor (pr22 C) f)) ~ (pr122 (pr111 C)) x

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
(λ f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, idto2mor (plunitor (pr22 C) f)) =
(pr122 (pr111 C)) x y

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
(λ f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, idto2mor (plunitor (pr22 C) f)) ~
(pr122 (pr111 C)) x y

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
idto2mor (plunitor (pr22 C) f) =
(pr122 (pr111 C)) x y f

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ x · f) f (plunitor (pr22 C) f)) =
(pr122 (pr111 C)) x y f

        apply idtoiso_plunitor.
      
C: strict_bicat
(λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (prunitor (pr22 C) f)) =
pr122 (pr211 (pr1 C))
 
C: strict_bicat
(λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (prunitor (pr22 C) f)) ~
pr122 (pr211 (pr1 C))

x: pr111 (pr1 C)
(λ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (prunitor (pr22 C) f)) =
(pr122 (pr211 (pr1 C))) x

        
C: strict_bicat
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
(λ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (prunitor (pr22 C) f)) ~
(pr122 (pr211 (pr1 C))) x

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
(λ f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, idto2mor (prunitor (pr22 C) f)) =
(pr122 (pr211 (pr1 C))) x y

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
(λ f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, idto2mor (prunitor (pr22 C) f)) ~
(pr122 (pr211 (pr1 C))) x y

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
idto2mor (prunitor (pr22 C) f) =
(pr122 (pr211 (pr1 C))) x y f

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 (f · id₁ y) f (prunitor (pr22 C) f)) =
(pr122 (pr211 (pr1 C))) x y f

        apply idtoiso_prunitor.
      
C: strict_bicat
(λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (! plunitor (pr22 C) f)) =
pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))

(λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (! plunitor (pr22 C) f)) ~
pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))

x: pr111 (pr1 C)
(λ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (! plunitor (pr22 C) f)) =
(pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))) x

x: pr111 (pr1 C)
(λ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (! plunitor (pr22 C) f)) ~
(pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))) x

x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
(λ f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, idto2mor (! plunitor (pr22 C) f)) =
(pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))) x y

x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
(λ f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, idto2mor (! plunitor (pr22 C) f)) ~
(pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))) x y

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
idto2mor (! plunitor (pr22 C) f) =
(pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))) x y f

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 f (id₁ x · f) (! plunitor (pr22 C) f)) =
(pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))) x y f

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
(idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ x · f) f (plunitor (pr22 C) f)) ^-1 =
(pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))) x y f

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
(idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ x · f) f (plunitor (pr22 C) f)) ^-1
• id₂ (id₁ x · f) = (pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))) x y f

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ x · f) f (plunitor (pr22 C) f))
  ^-1
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
id₂ (id₁ x · f) =
?Hε ^-1 • (pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))) x y f

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ x · f) f (plunitor (pr22 C) f))
  ^-1
 is_iso. 
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
id₂ (id₁ x · f) =
(is_invertible_2cell_inv
   (idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ x · f) f (plunitor (pr22 C) f)))
^-1 • (pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))) x y f

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
id₂ (id₁ x · f) =
idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ x · f) f (plunitor (pr22 C) f)
• (pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))) x y f

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ x · f) f (plunitor (pr22 C) f)
• (pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))) x y f = id₂ (id₁ x · f)

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ x · f) f (plunitor (pr22 C) f)
• (pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))) x y f = ?b
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b = id₂ (id₁ x · f)

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ x · f) f (plunitor (pr22 C) f)
• (pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))) x y f = ?b

          
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso_2_1 (id₁ x · f) f (plunitor (pr22 C) f) = ?y'

          apply idtoiso_plunitor.
        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
lunitor f • (pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))) x y f =
id₂ (id₁ x · f)

        apply lunitor_linvunitor.
      
C: strict_bicat
(λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (! prunitor (pr22 C) f)) =
pr122 (pr222 (pr111 C))
 
C: strict_bicat
(λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (! prunitor (pr22 C) f)) ~
pr122 (pr222 (pr111 C))

        
C: strict_bicat
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
(λ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (! prunitor (pr22 C) f)) =
(pr122 (pr222 (pr111 C))) x

        
C: strict_bicat

(λ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, Y ⟧),
 idto2mor (! prunitor (pr22 C) f)) ~
(pr122 (pr222 (pr111 C))) x

x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
(λ f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, idto2mor (! prunitor (pr22 C) f)) =
(pr122 (pr222 (pr111 C))) x y

x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
(λ f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, idto2mor (! prunitor (pr22 C) f)) ~
(pr122 (pr222 (pr111 C))) x y

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
idto2mor (! prunitor (pr22 C) f) =
(pr122 (pr222 (pr111 C))) x y f

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
f: pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 f (f · id₁ y) (! prunitor (pr22 C) f)) =
(pr122 (pr222 (pr111 C))) x y f

        
C: strict_bicat
x, y: pr111 (pr1 C)
