C: strict_bicat
transportf (λ C : prebicat_data, prebicat_laws C)
  (total2_paths2_f (idpath (pr111 (pr1 C)))
     (pathsdirprod
        (idpath (λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧), id₂ f))
        (pathsdirprod
           (funextsec
              (λ t : pr111 (pr1 C),
               ∏ (b : pr111 (pr1 C))
               (f : pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ t, b ⟧),
               id₁ t · f ==> f)
              (λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
               idto2mor (plunitor (pr22 C) f))
              (pr122 (pr111 C))
              ((λ x : pr111 (pr1 C),
                funextsec
                  (λ t : pr111 (pr1 C),
                   ∏ f : pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, t ⟧,
                   id₁ x · f ==> f)
                  (λ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, Y ⟧),
                   idto2mor (plunitor (pr22 C) f))
                  ((pr122 (pr111 C)) x)
                  ((λ y : pr111 (pr1 C),
                    funextsec
                      (λ t : pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                       id₁ x · t ==> t)
                      (λ f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                       idto2mor (plunitor (pr22 C) f))
                      ((pr122 (pr111 C)) x y)
                      ((λ f : pr111 ... ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                        internal_paths_rew_r (...)
                          (...) (...) (...) (...)
                          (...))
                       :
                       (λ f : ..., idto2mor ...) ~
                       (pr122 (pr111 C)) x y))
                   :
                   (λ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, Y ⟧),
                    idto2mor (plunitor (pr22 C) f)) ~
                   (pr122 (pr111 C)) x))
               :
               (λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                idto2mor (plunitor (pr22 C) f)) ~
               pr122 (pr111 C)))
           (pathsdirprod
              (funextsec
                 (λ t : pr111 (pr1 C),
                  ∏ (b : pr111 (pr1 C))
                  (f : pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ t, b ⟧),
                  f · id₁ b ==> f)
                 (λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                  idto2mor (prunitor (pr22 C) f))
                 (pr122 (pr211 (pr1 C)))
                 ((λ x : pr111 (pr1 C),
                   funextsec
                     (λ t : pr111 (pr1 C),
                      ∏ f : pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, t ⟧,
                      f · id₁ t ==> f)
                     (λ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, Y ⟧),
                      idto2mor (prunitor (pr22 C) f))
                     ((pr122 (pr211 (pr1 C))) x)
                     ((λ y : pr111 (pr1 C),
                       funextsec
                         (λ t : pr111 ... ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                          t · ... ==> t)
                         (λ f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                          idto2mor (...))
                         ((pr122 (pr211 ...)) x y)
                         ((λ ..., ...)
                          :
                          (...) ~ ... x y))
                      :
                      (λ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, Y ⟧),
                       idto2mor (prunitor (pr22 C) f)) ~
                      (pr122 (pr211 (pr1 C))) x))
                  :
                  (λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                   idto2mor (prunitor (pr22 C) f)) ~
                  pr122 (pr211 (pr1 C))))
              (pathsdirprod
                 (funextsec
                    (λ t : pr111 (pr1 C),
                     ∏ (b : pr111 (pr1 C))
                     (f : pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ t, b ⟧),
                     f ==> id₁ t · f)
                    (λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                     idto2mor (! plunitor (pr22 C) f))
                    (pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C)))
                    ((λ x : pr111 (pr1 C),
                      funextsec
                        (λ t : pr111 (pr1 C),
                         ∏ f : pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ x, t ⟧,
                         f ==> id₁ x · f)
                        (λ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, Y ⟧),
                         idto2mor
                           (! plunitor (pr22 C) f))
                        ((pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))) x)
                        ((λ y : pr111 (pr1 C),
                          funextsec (λ ..., ...)
                            (λ ..., ...) (... x y)
                            (... : ...))
                         :
                         (λ (Y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, Y ⟧),
                          idto2mor (! ...)) ~
                         (pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))) x))
                     :
                     (λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                      idto2mor (! plunitor (pr22 C) f)) ~
                     pr122 (pr221 (pr11 C))))
                 (pathsdirprod
                    (funextsec
                       (λ t : pr111 (pr1 C),
                        ∏ (b : pr111 (pr1 C))
                        (f : pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ t, b ⟧),
                        f ==> f · id₁ b)
                       (λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                        idto2mor
                          (! prunitor (pr22 C) f))
                       (pr122 (pr222 (pr111 C)))
                       ((λ x : pr111 (pr1 C),
                         funextsec
                           (λ t : pr111 (pr1 C),
                            ∏ f : pr111 ... ⟦ x, t ⟧,
                            f ==> f · ...)
                           (λ (Y : C)
                            (f : C ⟦ x, Y ⟧),
                            idto2mor
                              (! prunitor ... f))
                           ((pr122 (pr222 (pr111 C)))
                              x)
                           ((λ y : pr111 ...,
                             funextsec ... ... ... ...)
                            :
                            (λ ... ..., ...) ~
                            (pr122 ...) x))
                        :
                        (λ (X Y : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                         idto2mor
                           (! prunitor (pr22 C) f)) ~
                        pr122 (pr222 (pr111 C))))
                    (pathsdirprod
                       (funextsec
                          (λ t : pr111 (pr1 C),
                           ∏ (b c d : pr111 (pr1 C))
                           (f : pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ t, b ⟧)
                           (g : pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ b, c ⟧)
                           (h : pr111 (pr1 C) ⟦ c, d ⟧),
                           f · g · h ==> f · (g · h))
                          (λ (W X Y Z : C)
                           (f : C ⟦ W, X ⟧)
                           (g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
                           (h : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
                           idto2mor
                             (! plassociator (pr22 C)
                                  f g h))
                          (pr122 (pr222 (pr211 (pr1 C))))
                          ((λ w : pr111 (pr1 C),
                            funextsec
                              (λ t : pr111 ...,
                               ∏ ... ... ... ..., ...)
                              (λ (X Y Z : C) (f : ...)
                               (g : ...) (h : ...),
                               idto2mor ...)
                              ((pr122 ...) w)
                              ((...) : ... ~ ...))
                           :
                           (λ (W X Y Z : C)
                            (f : C ⟦ W, X ⟧)
                            (g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
                            (h : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
                            idto2mor
                              (! plassociator ... f g
                                   h)) ~
                           pr122 (pr222 (pr211 (pr1 C)))))
                       (pathsdirprod
                          (funextsec
                             (λ t : pr111 (pr1 C),
                              ∏
                              (b c d : pr111 (pr1 C))
                              (f : pr111 (...) ⟦ t, b
                                   ⟧)
                              (g : pr111 (...) ⟦ b, c
                                   ⟧)
                              (h : pr111 (...) ⟦ c, d
                                   ⟧),
                              f · (...) ==> f · g · h)
                             (λ (W X Y Z : C)
                              (f : C ⟦ W, X ⟧)
                              (g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
                              (h : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
                              idto2mor
                                (plassociator (pr22 C)
                                   f g h))
                             (pr122 (pr222 (pr221 
                                            (pr11 C))))
                             ((λ w : pr111 (...),
                               funextsec (...) (...)
                                 (...) (...))
                              :
                              (λ (W X Y Z : C)
                               (f : ...) (g : ...)
                               (h : ...), idto2mor ...) ~
                              pr122 (pr222 (pr221 
                                            (pr11 C)))))
                          (pathsdirprod
                             (idpath
                                (λ (X Y : C)
                                 (f g h : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
                                 (α : f ==> g)

                                    ...))))))))))

        (λ C : prebicat_1_id_comp_cells,

                 :
                 ∏ (X : ... ...) (Y Z : ... ...),
                 ... X Y → ... → ...)),,
               ((λ (X
                    Y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                        C)))
                 (f g : pr111 (pr11 (...)) ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                 two_cat_cells
                   (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C))
                   f g)
                :
                ∏
                (X : let X := pr1 (...) in
                     let X0 := pr1 X in
                     let X1 := ... in ... ...)
                (Y : let X0 := pr1 (...) in
                     let X1 := pr1 X0 in
                     let X2 := ... in ... ...),
                ((...) : ... → ...) X Y
                → (... : ...) X Y → UU))
          (f : ((((... ...),, (... : ...)),,
                 ((...) : ∏ ..., ...),,
                 ((...) : ∏ ... ..., ...)),,
                ((λ (X Y : pr111 (pr111 ...))
                  (f g : pr111 ... ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                  two_cat_cells (pr111 ...) f g)
                 :
                 ∏ (X : let X := ... in ... ...)
                 (Y : let X0 := ... in ... ...),
                 (...) X Y → ... X Y → UU)) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
          f ==> f · id₁ b),,
         (((λ (W X Y
               Z : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                   C)))
            (f : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                C)) ⟦ W, X ⟧)
            (g : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                C)) ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
            (h : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                C)) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
            idto2mor (! assoc (f : ... ⟦ W, X ⟧) g h))
           :
           ∏
           (W
            X : let X :=
                  pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
                let X0 := pr1 X in
                let X1 := pr1 X0 in
                let X2 := pr1 X1 in
                let X3 := ... in ... X4)
           (Y
            Z : let X0 :=
                  pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
                let X1 := pr1 X0 in
                let X2 := pr1 X1 in
                let X3 := pr1 X2 in
                let X4 := ... in ... X5)
           (f : ((λ x y : pr111 ...,
                  pr111 ... ⟦ x, y ⟧)
                 :
                 (... ...) → (...) → UU) W X)
           (g : ((λ x y : pr111 ...,
                  pr111 ... ⟦ x, y ⟧)
                 :
                 (... ...) → (...) → UU) X Y)
           (h : ((λ x y : pr111 ...,
                  pr111 ... ⟦ x, y ⟧)
                 :
                 (... ...) → (...) → UU) Y Z),
           ((λ (X0 Y0 : pr111 (pr111 ...))
             (f0 g0 : pr111 ... ⟦ X0, Y0 ⟧),
             two_cat_cells (pr111 ...) f0 g0)
            :
            ∏ (X0 : let X0 := ... in ... ...)
            (Y0 : let X1 := ... in ... ...),
            (...) X0 Y0 → ... X0 Y0 → UU) W Z
             (((λ ... ... ..., ...)
               :
               ∏ (X0 : ...) (Y0 Z0 : ...), ... → ...)
                W Y Z ((... : ...) W X Y f g) h)
             (((λ ... ... ..., ...)
               :
               ∏ (X0 : ...) (Y0 Z0 : ...), ... → ...)
                W X Z f ((... : ...) X Y Z g h)))
          :
          ∏
          (a b c
           d : (((let X := ... in ... ...),,
                 ((...) : ... → ...)),,
                ((λ ..., ...) : ∏ X : ..., ... X X),,
                ((λ ... ... ..., ...)
                 :
                 ∏ (X : ...) (Y Z : ...), ... → ...)),,
               ((λ (X Y : pr111 (pr111 (...)))
                 (f g : pr111 (pr11 ...) ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                 two_cat_cells (pr111 (...)) f g)
                :
                ∏
                (X : let X := pr1 ... in
                     let X0 := ... in ... ...)
                (Y : let X0 := pr1 ... in
                     let X1 := ... in ... ...),
                (... : ...) X Y → (...) X Y → UU))
          (f : ((((...),, (...)),,
                 (... : ...),, (... : ...)),,
                ((λ (X Y : pr111 ...) (f g : ...),
                  two_cat_cells ... f g)
                 :
                 ∏ (X : ... ...) (Y : ... ...),
                 ... X Y → ... → UU)) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
          (g : ((((...),, (...)),,
                 (... : ...),, (... : ...)),,
                ((λ (X Y : pr111 ...) (f0 g : ...),
                  two_cat_cells ... f0 g)
                 :
                 ∏ (X : ... ...) (Y : ... ...),
                 ... X Y → ... → UU)) ⟦ b, c ⟧)
          (h : ((((...),, (...)),,
                 (... : ...),, (... : ...)),,
                ((λ (X Y : pr111 ...) (f0 g0 : ...),
                  two_cat_cells ... f0 g0)
                 :
                 ∏ (X : ... ...) (Y : ... ...),
                 ... X Y → ... → UU)) ⟦ c, d ⟧),
          f · g · h ==> f · (g · h)),,
         (((λ (W X Y
               Z : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                   C)))
            (f : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                C)) ⟦ W, X ⟧)
            (g : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                C)) ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
            (h : pr111 (pr11 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                C)) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
            idto2mor (assoc (f : ...) g h))
           :
           ∏
           (W
            X : let X :=
                  pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
                let X0 := pr1 X in
                let X1 := pr1 X0 in
                let X2 := ... in ... ...)
           (Y
            Z : let X0 :=
                  pr1 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C) in
                let X1 := pr1 X0 in
                let X2 := pr1 X1 in
                let X3 := ... in ... ...)
           (f : ((λ ..., ...) : (...) → ... → UU) W X)
           (g : ((λ ..., ...) : (...) → ... → UU) X Y)
           (h : ((λ ..., ...) : (...) → ... → UU) Y Z),
           ((λ (X0 Y0 : pr111 ...) (f0 g0 : ...),
             two_cat_cells ... f0 g0)
            :
            ∏ (X0 : ... ...) (Y0 : ... ...),
            ... X0 Y0 → ... → UU) W Z
             (((...) : ∏ ... ..., ...) W X Z f
                ((...) X Y Z g h))
             (((...) : ∏ ... ..., ...) W Y Z
                ((...) W X Y f g) h))
          :
          ∏
          (a b c
           d : (((... ...),, (... : ...)),,
                ((...) : ∏ ..., ...),,
                ((...) : ∏ ... ..., ...)),,
               ((λ (X Y : pr111 (pr111 ...))
                 (f g : pr111 ... ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
                 two_cat_cells (pr111 ...) f g)
                :
                ∏ (X : let X := ... in ... ...)
                (Y : let X0 := ... in ... ...),
                (...) X Y → ... X Y → UU))
          (f : (((...,, ...),, (...),, (...)),,
                ((λ ... ..., ...)
                 :
                 ∏ (X : ...) (Y : ...), ... → ...))
               ⟦ a, b ⟧)
          (g : (((...,, ...),, (...),, (...)),,
                ((λ ... ..., ...)
                 :
                 ∏ (X : ...) (Y : ...), ... → ...))
               ⟦ b, c ⟧)
          (h : (((...,, ...),, (...),, (...)),,
                ((λ ... ..., ...)
                 :
                 ∏ (X : ...) (Y : ...), ... → ...))
               ⟦ c, d ⟧), f · (g · h) ==> f · g · h),,
         (((λ (X
               Y : pr111 (pr111 (strict_bicat_to_two_cat
                                   C)))
            (f g h : pr111 (pr11 (...)) ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
            (α : two_cat_cells (pr111 (...)) f g)
            (β : two_cat_cells (pr111 (...)) g h),
            TwoCategories.vcomp2 α β)
           :
           ∏
           (X : let X := pr1 (...) in
                let X0 := pr1 X in
                let X1 := ... in ... ...)
           (Y : let X0 := pr1 (...) in
                let X1 := pr1 X0 in
                let X2 := ... in ... ...)
           (f g h : ((...) : ... → ...) X Y),
           ((...) : ∏ ... ..., ...) X Y f g
           → (... : ...) X Y g h → (... : ...) X Y f h)
          :
          ∏
          (a
           b : (((...),, (...)),,
                (... : ...),, (... : ...)),,
               ((λ (X Y : pr111 ...) (f g : ...),
                 two_cat_cells ... f g)
                :
                ∏ (X : ... ...) (Y : ... ...),
                ... X Y → ... → UU))
          (f : (((...),, ...,, ...),,
                ((...) : ∏ ... ..., ...)) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
          (g : (((...),, ...,, ...),,
                ((...) : ∏ ... ..., ...)) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
          (h : (((...),, ...,, ...),,
                ((...) : ∏ ... ..., ...)) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
          f ==> g → g ==> h → f ==> h),,
         (((λ (X Y Z : pr111 (pr111 (...)))
            (f : pr111 (pr11 ...) ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
            (g h : pr111 (pr11 ...) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧)
            (α : two_cat_cells (pr111 ...) g h),
            TwoCategories.lwhisker f α)
           :
           ∏
           (X : let X := pr1 ... in
                let X0 := ... in ... ...)
           (Y
            Z : let X0 := pr1 ... in
                let X1 := ... in ... ...)
           (f : (... : ...) X Y)
           (g h : (... : ...) Y Z),
           (... : ...) Y Z g h
           → (... : ...) X Z (... X Y Z f g)
               (... X Y Z f h))
          :
          ∏
          (a b
           c : ((...,, ...),, (...),, (...)),,
               ((λ ... ..., ...)
                :
                ∏ (X : ...) (Y : ...), ... → ...))
          (f : ((...,, ...),, (... : ...)) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
          (g1
           g2 : ((...,, ...),, (... : ...)) ⟦ b, c ⟧),
          g1 ==> g2 → f · g1 ==> f · g2),,
         (((λ (X Y Z : pr111 (pr111 (...)))
            (g h : pr111 (pr11 ...) ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
            (f : pr111 (pr11 ...) ⟦ Y, Z ⟧)
            (α : two_cat_cells (pr111 ...) g h),
            TwoCategories.rwhisker f α)
           :
           ∏
           (X : let X := pr1 ... in
                let X0 := ... in ... ...)
           (Y
            Z : let X0 := pr1 ... in
                let X1 := ... in ... ...)
           (g h : (... : ...) X Y)
           (f : (... : ...) Y Z),
           (... : ...) X Y g h
           → (... : ...) X Z (... X Y Z g f)
               (... X Y Z h f))
          :
          (λ _ : ∏ (a b c : ...,, ...)
                 (f : ... ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                 (g1 g2 : ... ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                 g1 ==> g2 → ... ==> ...,
           ∏ (a b c : (...),, (...))
           (f1 f2 : (...) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
           (g : (...) ⟦ b, c ⟧),
           f1 ==> f2 → f1 · g ==> f2 · g)
            (((λ ... ... ... ..., ...)
              :
              ∏ (X : ...) (Y Z : ...) (f : ...)
              (g h : ...), ... → ...)
             :
             ∏ (a b c : (...),, (...))
             (f : (...) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (g1 g2 : (...) ⟦ b, c ⟧),
             g1 ==> g2 → f · g1 ==> f · g2))) =
      pr211 (pr1 C)))
  (two_cat_to_prebicat_laws
     (strict_bicat_to_two_cat C)) = pr211 C
 
C: strict_bicat
∏ (a b : pr111 C) (f g : pr111 C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
isaset (f ==> g)

    
C: strict_bicat
a, b: pr111 C
f, g: pr111 C ⟦ a, b ⟧
isaset (f ==> g)

    apply cellset_property.
Qed.


C: two_cat
strict_bicat_to_two_cat (two_cat_to_strict_bicat C) =
C


C: two_cat
strict_bicat_to_two_cat (two_cat_to_strict_bicat C) =
C

  
C: two_cat
isPredicate TwoCategories.isaset_cells
C: two_cat
pr1
  (strict_bicat_to_two_cat (two_cat_to_strict_bicat C)) =
pr1 C

  
C: two_cat
isPredicate TwoCategories.isaset_cells

    
C: two_cat
x: two_precat
isaprop (TwoCategories.isaset_cells x)

    
C: two_cat
x: two_precat
t, t0: x
t1, t2: x ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t2 : x ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
    isaset (two_cat_cells (pr1 x) t1 t2)) t2)

    apply isapropisaset.
  
C: two_cat
pr1
  (strict_bicat_to_two_cat (two_cat_to_strict_bicat C)) =
pr1 C

  
C: two_cat
strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category
  (two_cat_to_strict_bicat C) = pr11 C
C: two_cat
transportf (λ C : two_cat_category, two_cat_laws C) 
  ?p
  (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_laws
     (two_cat_to_strict_bicat C)) = pr21 C

  
C: two_cat
strict_bicat_to_two_cat_category
  (two_cat_to_strict_bicat C) = pr11 C
 
C: two_cat
strict_bicat_to_two_cat_data
  (two_cat_to_strict_bicat C) = pr111 C
C: two_cat
transportf
  (λ C : two_cat_data,
   is_precategory C × has_homsets C) ?p
  (strict_bicat_to_precategory_is_precategory
     (two_cat_to_strict_bicat C),,
   strict_bicat_to_precategory_has_homsets
     (two_cat_to_strict_bicat C)) = pr211 C

    
C: two_cat
strict_bicat_to_two_cat_data
  (two_cat_to_strict_bicat C) = pr111 C
 apply idpath.
    
C: two_cat
transportf
  (λ C : two_cat_data,
   is_precategory C × has_homsets C)
  (idpath (pr111 C))
  (strict_bicat_to_precategory_is_precategory
     (two_cat_to_strict_bicat C),,
   strict_bicat_to_precategory_has_homsets
     (two_cat_to_strict_bicat C)) = pr211 C
 
C: two_cat
isaprop (is_precategory (pr111 C))
C: two_cat
isaprop (has_homsets (pr111 C))

      
C: two_cat
isaprop (is_precategory (pr111 C))
 
C: two_cat
has_homsets (pr111 C)

        
C: two_cat
x, y: pr111 C
isaset (pr111 C ⟦ x, y ⟧)

        apply (pr22 (pr11 C)).
      
C: two_cat
isaprop (has_homsets (pr111 C))
 apply isaprop_has_homsets.
  
C: two_cat
transportf (λ C : two_cat_category, two_cat_laws C)
  (total2_paths2_f (idpath (pr111 C))
     (let X :=
        λ (X Y : UU) (H : isaprop X) (H0 : isaprop Y)
        (x x' : X × Y),
        pr1 (isapropdirprod X Y H H0 x x') in
      X (is_precategory (pr111 C))
        (has_homsets (pr111 C))
        (isaprop_is_precategory (pr111 C)
           ((λ x y : pr111 C, (pr221 (pr1 C)) x y)
            :
            has_homsets (pr111 C)))
        (isaprop_has_homsets (pr111 C))
        (transportf
           (λ C : two_cat_data,
            is_precategory C × has_homsets C)
           (idpath (pr111 C))
           (strict_bicat_to_precategory_is_precategory
              (two_cat_to_strict_bicat C),,
            strict_bicat_to_precategory_has_homsets
              (two_cat_to_strict_bicat C))) (pr211 C)))
  (strict_bicat_to_two_cat_laws
     (two_cat_to_strict_bicat C)) = pr21 C
 apply isaprop_two_cat_laws.
Qed.


two_cat ≃ strict_bicat


two_cat ≃ strict_bicat

  
two_cat → strict_bicat
isweq ?f

  
two_cat → strict_bicat
 exact two_cat_to_strict_bicat.
  
isweq two_cat_to_strict_bicat
 
strict_bicat → two_cat
∏ x : two_cat, ?g (two_cat_to_strict_bicat x) = x
∏ y : strict_bicat, two_cat_to_strict_bicat (?g y) = y

    
strict_bicat → two_cat
 exact strict_bicat_to_two_cat.
    
∏ x : two_cat,
strict_bicat_to_two_cat (two_cat_to_strict_bicat x) =
x
 exact two_cat_to_strict_bicat_to_two_cat.
    
∏ y : strict_bicat,
two_cat_to_strict_bicat (strict_bicat_to_two_cat y) =
y
 exact strict_bicat_to_two_cat_to_strict_bicat.
Defined.
